title: Adjectival complement 'de budeliao'
explanation: Adjectival complement 'de budeliao'. Used for expressing degree, emphasizing, expressing quality.

examples.chinese: 嗨，他跟老总的关系好得不得了，你一定要小心！
examples.pinyin: hāi，tā gēn lǎozǒng de guānxì hǎo dé bùdéle，nǐ yīdìng yào xiǎoxīn！
examples.english: Hi, his relationship with the boss is so good, you have to be careful!

examples.chinese: 爸爸气得不得了，你要倒霉啦。
examples.pinyin: bàbà qì dé bùdéle，nǐ yào dǎoméi la 。
examples.english: Dad is terribly angry, you're out of luck.

examples.chinese: 她的妈妈刚去世，她难过得不得了。
examples.pinyin: tādemāmāgāngqùshì， tānánguò dé bùdéle 。
examples.english: Her mother had just died and she was very sad.

title: Adjectival complement 'de hen'
explanation: Adjectival complement 'de hen'. Used for expressing degree, emphasizing, expressing quality.

examples.chinese: 你觉得不好吃？
examples.pinyin: nǐ juédé bù hǎochī ？
examples.english: Do you feel bad?

examples.chinese: 不用担心，这次考试简单得很。
examples.pinyin: bù yòng dànxīn，zhècì kǎoshì jiǎndān déhěn 。
examples.english: Don't worry, this exam is very simple.

examples.chinese: 离我远点儿！我现在烦得很！
examples.pinyin: lí wǒ yuǎn diǎnér ！wǒ xiànzài fán déhěn！
examples.english: Stay away from me! I'm so troubled now!

examples.chinese: 你觉得他不高兴？
examples.pinyin: nǐ juédé tā bù gāoxīng ？
examples.english: Do you think he is upset?

examples.chinese: 我最近忙得很，每天都要加班。
examples.pinyin: wǒ zùijìn máng déhěn，měitiān dū yào jiābān 。
examples.english: I have been very busy recently and have to work overtime every day.

title: Challenging an adjective with 'shenme'
structure: Verb + 什么 (+ Verb) ？  /  Adj. + 什么 (+ Adj.) ？
explanation: Challenging an adjective with 'shenme'. Used for asking questions.

examples.chinese: 紧张什么啊，你不是上过好几次舞台了吗？
examples.pinyin: jǐnzhāng shíyāo a，nǐ bù shì shàng guò hǎo jī cì wǔtái le ma ？
examples.english: What's so nervous, haven't you been on stage several times?

examples.chinese: 郁闷什么呀，看看这蓝蓝的天空，绿绿的田园，生活多美好啊！
examples.pinyin: yùmèn shíyāo yā，kànkàn zhè lánlán detiānkōng，lv̀lv̀ de tiányuán，shēnghuó duō měihǎo a！
examples.english: Depressed, look at this blue sky, green pastoral, how beautiful life is!

examples.chinese: 你急什么急，还早着呢。
examples.pinyin: nǐjí shíyāo jí，huán zǎo zháo ní 。
examples.english: Why are you in a hurry, still early?

examples.chinese: 你看什么看，没见过美女啊？
examples.pinyin: nǐkàn shíyāo kàn，méi jiàn guò měi nv̌ a ？
examples.english: What are you looking at, have you ever seen a beauty?

examples.chinese: 你忙什么忙？
examples.pinyin: nǐmángshíyāománg ？
examples.english: What are you busy with?

title: Expressing 'a bit too'
explanation: Expressing 'a bit too'. Used for expressing quality.

examples.chinese: 这条牛仔裤好像短了点儿。
examples.pinyin: zhè tiáo níuzǐkù hǎoxiàng duǎn le diǎnér 。
examples.english: The jeans seem to be shorter.

examples.chinese: 那个地方离我家远了一点儿。
examples.pinyin: nàgè dìfāng lí wǒ jiā yuǎn le yīdiǎnér 。
examples.english: That place is a bit far from my house.

examples.chinese: 这件衬衫小了点儿，我想换一件。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiàn chènshān xiǎo le diǎnér ，wǒ xiǎng huàn yī jiàn 。
examples.english: This shirt is a little smaller, I want to change it.

examples.chinese: 他给的这个红包好像少了点儿。
examples.pinyin: tā gěi de zhègè hóngbāo hǎoxiàng shǎo le diǎnér 。
examples.english: The red envelope he gave seemed to be missing.

examples.chinese: 你管得是不是多了点儿？
examples.pinyin: nǐ guǎn dé shì bù shì duō le diǎnér ？
examples.english: Do you have more control?

title: Saying 'a lot' with 'youdeshi'
structure: Subj. + 有的是 + Noun  /  Noun + Subj. + 有的是 。
explanation: Saying 'a lot' with 'youdeshi'. Used for expressing degree, expressing quantity.

examples.chinese: 他爸是大老板，有的是钱。
examples.pinyin: tā bà shì dà lǎobǎn ，yǒudeshì qián 。
examples.english: His dad is a big boss, and some have money.

examples.chinese: 她是全职妈妈，有的是时间。
examples.pinyin: tā shì quánzhí māmā ，yǒudeshì shíjiān 。
examples.english: She is a full-time mother, and some have time.

examples.chinese: 我一个大男人，有的是力气。
examples.pinyin: wǒ yī gè dànánrén ，yǒudeshì lìqì 。
examples.english: I am a big man, some have strength.

examples.chinese: 上海这么大的城市，工作机会有的是。
examples.pinyin: shànghǎi zhèyāo dà de chéngshì ，gōngzuò jīhùi yǒudeshì 。
examples.english: There are some job opportunities in a city as large as Shanghai.

examples.chinese: 这样的笔我家有的是，这些都送给你。
examples.pinyin: zhèyáng de bǐ wǒ jiā yǒudeshì ，zhèxiē dū sònggěi nǐ 。
examples.english: What I have in my family is that these are all for you.

title: Advanced use of 'you'
structure: Subj. ＋Verb + 了 + 又 + Verb，还是 / 就是 ……
explanation: Advanced use of 'you'. Used for describing actions.

examples.chinese: 这个人我看了又看，还是觉得我不认识他。
examples.pinyin: zhè gè rén wǒ kàn leyòu kàn，huánshì juédé wǒ bù rènshì tā 。
examples.english: I looked at this person again and again, and still thought I didn't know him.

examples.chinese: 我想了又想，还是觉得不能这样做。
examples.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng leyòu xiǎng，huánshì juédé bù néng zhèyáng zuò 。
examples.english: I thought about it again and again, and still felt that I couldn't do it.

examples.chinese: 他找了又找，还是没找到他的钱包。
examples.pinyin: tā zhǎoleyòu zhǎo，huánshì méi zhǎodào tā de qián bāo 。
examples.english: He searched and searched, but still did not find his wallet.

examples.chinese: 他想了又想，还是不同意。
examples.pinyin: tā xiǎngleyòu xiǎng，huánshì bù tóngyì 。
examples.english: He thought about it, but still disagreed.

examples.chinese: 我们问了又问，她就是不说。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen wèn le yòu wèn，tā jìushì bù shuō 。
examples.english: We asked and asked, she just didn't say.

title: Advanced uses of 'dou'
explanation: Advanced uses of 'dou'. Used for describing actions, expressing quantity.

examples.chinese: 我都能闻见面包的香味。
examples.pinyin: wǒ dū néng wénjiàn miànbāo de xiāngwèi 。
examples.english: I can smell the smell of bread.

examples.chinese: 我对你太了解了，我都能知道你下一步要做什么。
examples.pinyin: wǒ dùi nǐ tài lejiě le ，wǒ dū néng zhīdào nǐ xià yībù yào zuò shíyāo 。
examples.english: I know you too well, I can know what you are going to do next.

examples.chinese: 我很想妈妈，有时候我都能看见她。
examples.pinyin: wǒ hěn xiǎng māmā ，yǒushíhòu wǒ dū néng kànjiàn tā 。
examples.english: I miss my mother very much, sometimes I can see her.

examples.chinese: 他都这么说了，你还好意思再找他帮忙？
examples.pinyin: tā dū zhèyāo shuō le ，nǐ huán hǎoyìsī zài zhǎo tā bāngmáng ？
examples.english: He has said so, are you still sorry to ask him for help?

examples.chinese: 来都来了，就先别急着走了。
examples.pinyin: lái dū lái le ， jìu xiān bié jízháo zǒu le 。
examples.english: Come all come, don't rush away.

title: Advanced uses of 'hai'
structure: Subj. + 还 + Predicate / [Verb Phrase] + 吗 ?
explanation: Advanced uses of 'hai'. Used for expressing attitude, expressing degree.

examples.chinese: 这个小孩还真聪明！
examples.pinyin: zhègè xiǎohái huán zhēn cōngmíng ！
examples.english: This kid is really smart!

examples.chinese: 还留过学呢，英语这么差。
examples.pinyin: huán líu guò xué ní ，yīngyǔ zhèyāo chà 。
examples.english: I have studied abroad. English is so poor.

examples.chinese: 还好朋友呢，天天说我坏话。
examples.pinyin: huán hǎopéngyǒu ní ，tiāntiān shuō wǒ huàihuà 。
examples.english: Fortunately, my friends say bad things every day.

examples.chinese: 还大老板呢，一点也不大方。
examples.pinyin: huán dà lǎobǎn ní ，yīdiǎn yě bù dàfāng 。
examples.english: The big boss is not generous at all.

examples.chinese: 都怪你，你还生气呢。
examples.pinyin: dū guài nǐ ，nǐ huán shēngqì ní 。
examples.english: Blame you, you are still angry.

title: Advanced uses of 'zong'
structure: 总 + 会 / 得 / 要 / 能 + Verb  /  总 + 不 / 没 + Verb
explanation: Advanced uses of 'zong'. Used for describing things.

examples.chinese: 这里是他家，他总会回来的。
examples.pinyin: zhèlǐ shì tā jiā，tā zǒng hùi húilái de 。
examples.english: This is his home, he will always come back.

examples.chinese: 咱们总得想个办法啊。
examples.pinyin: zánmen zǒng dé xiǎng gè bànfǎ a 。
examples.english: We have to find a way.

examples.chinese: 不管发生了什么，人总要吃饭吧。
examples.pinyin: bùguǎn fāshēng le shíyāo，rén zǒng yào chīfàn ba 。
examples.english: No matter what happens, people always have to eat.

examples.chinese: 他是你爸爸，你总要礼貌一点吧。
examples.pinyin: tā shì nǐ bàbà，nǐ zǒng yào lǐmào yīdiǎn ba 。
examples.english: He is your father, you should always be polite.

examples.chinese: 你拿了人家的钱，总得帮人家做事吧。
examples.pinyin: nǐ ná le rénjiā de qián，zǒng dé bāng rénjiā zuò shì ba 。
examples.english: If you take someone's money, you have to help others.

title: An additional step with 'jin yi bu'
explanation: An additional step with 'jin yi bu'. Used for expressing degree.

examples.chinese: 我们准备进一步扩大中国市场。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen zhǔnbèi jìnyībù kuòdà zhōngguó shìcháng 。
examples.english: We are ready to further expand the Chinese market.

examples.chinese: 这件事情需要进一步调查。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiàn shìqíng xūyào jìnyībù diàochá 。
examples.english: This matter needs further investigation.

examples.chinese: 这次开会的内容是进一步研究这个项目。
examples.pinyin: zhè cì kāihùi de nèiróng shì jìnyībù yánjīu zhè gè xiàngmù 。
examples.english: The content of this meeting is to further study this project.

examples.chinese: 如果你要在中国工作你最好进一步学汉语。
examples.pinyin: rúguǒ nǐ yào zài zhōngguó gōngzuò nǐ zùihǎo jìnyībù xué hànyǔ 。
examples.english: If you want to work in China, you better learn Chinese further.

examples.chinese: 我们在一起旅游后我们的友谊有了进一步的发展。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen zài yīqǐ lv̌yóu hòu wǒmen de yǒuyí yǒu le jìnyībù de fāzhǎn 。
examples.english: Our friendship has further developed after we traveled together.

title: Declaring the only option with 'zhihao'
explanation: Declaring the only option with 'zhihao'. Used for describing attitude.

examples.chinese: 餐厅都关门了，我们只好去吃KFC。
examples.pinyin: cāntīng dū guānmén le ，wǒmen zhǐhǎo qù chī KFC 。
examples.english: The restaurant is closed, we had to eat KFC.

examples.chinese: 我忘了预约，只好去排队。
examples.pinyin: wǒ wàng le yùyuē ，zhǐhǎo qù páidùi 。
examples.english: I forgot to make an appointment and had to go in line.

examples.chinese: 他没有时间去，只好我去。
examples.pinyin: tā méiyǒu shíjiān qù ，zhǐhǎo wǒ qù 。
examples.english: He had no time to go, so I had to go.

examples.chinese: 老板不给我涨工资，我只好去干私活。
examples.pinyin: lǎobǎn bù gěi wǒ zhǎnggōngzī ，wǒ zhǐhǎo qù gānsīhuó 。
examples.english: The boss didn't raise my salary, so I had to do private work.

examples.chinese: 她实在受不了那么吵闹的邻居，只好搬走了。
examples.pinyin: tā shízài shòubùle nàyāo chǎonào de línjū ，zhǐhǎo bānzǒu le 。
examples.english: She couldn't bear such a noisy neighbor and had to move away.

title: Expressing 'after all' with 'bijing'
structure: 毕竟 ⋯⋯  /  虽然 ⋯⋯ ，但 + 毕竟 ⋯⋯ ，(as a result) ⋯⋯
explanation: Expressing 'after all' with 'bijing'

examples.chinese: 别骂他了，他毕竟是孩子。
examples.pinyin: bié mà tā le ，tā bìjìng shì háizǐ 。
examples.english: Stop scolding him, he is a child after all.

examples.chinese: 毕竟是冬天，你还是多穿点吧。
examples.pinyin: bìjìng shì dōngtiān ，nǐ huánshì duō chuān diǎn ba 。
examples.english: After all, it is winter, you should wear more.

examples.chinese: 他不知道也很正常，毕竟他不是本地人。
examples.pinyin: tā bùzhīdào yě hěn zhèngcháng，bìjìng tā bù shì běndì rén 。
examples.english: It is normal for him not to know, after all, he is not a native.

examples.chinese: 有的玩笑不能再开了，毕竟他们都是大孩子了。
examples.pinyin: yǒude wánxiào bùnéng zài kāi le，bìjìng tāmen dū shì dàháizǐ le 。
examples.english: Some jokes can no longer be opened, after all they are older children.

examples.chinese: 我们不太想搬，毕竟在这儿住了好几年了。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen bùtài xiǎng bān ，bìjìng zài zhèér zhù le hǎojī nián le 。
examples.english: We don't want to move very much, after all, we have lived here for several years.

title: Expressing 'almost' using 'chadian mei'
structure: Subj. + 差点 + 没 + Verb Phrase
explanation: Expressing 'almost' using 'chadian mei'. Used for describing actions.

examples.chinese: 我差点儿没想起来。
examples.pinyin: wǒ chàdiǎnér méi xiǎng qǐlái 。
examples.english: I hardly remembered.

examples.chinese: 我差点没赶上火车。
examples.pinyin: wǒ chàdiǎn méi gǎn shàng huǒchē 。
examples.english: I almost missed the train.

examples.chinese: 他差点没通过考试。
examples.pinyin: tā chàdiǎn méi tōngguò kǎoshì 。
examples.english: He almost failed the exam.

examples.chinese: 排队的人太多了，差点儿没买到。
examples.pinyin: páidùi de rén tài duō le，chàdiǎnér méi mǎidào 。
examples.english: There were too many people in the queue, and they almost didn't buy it.

title: Expressing 'anyway' as 'fanzheng'
explanation: Expressing 'anyway' as 'fanzheng'. Used for expressing attitude, expressing determination.

examples.chinese: 不管他去不去，反正我要去。
examples.pinyin: bùguǎn tā qù bù qù ，fǎnzhèng wǒ yào qù 。
examples.english: Whether he goes or not, I'm going anyway.

examples.chinese: 不管你信不信，反正我信。
examples.pinyin: bùguǎn nǐ xìn bù xìn ，fǎnzhèng wǒ xìn 。
examples.english: Believe it or not, I believe it anyway.

examples.chinese: 不管他爸爸是谁，反正我要告他。
examples.pinyin: bùguǎn tā bàbà shì shúi ，fǎnzhèng wǒ yào gào tā 。
examples.english: No matter who his father is, I want to sue him anyway.

examples.chinese: 随便别人怎么想，反正我无所谓。
examples.pinyin: súibiàn biérén zěnyāo xiǎng ，fǎnzhèng wǒ wúsuǒwèi 。
examples.english: Whatever others think, I don't care anyway.

examples.chinese: 说不说都一样，反正没有人会听我的。
examples.pinyin: shuō bù shuō dū yīyáng ，fǎnzhèng méiyǒu rén hùi tīng wǒ de 。
examples.english: It ’s the same whether you say it or not. Anyway, no one will listen to me.

title: Expressing 'as much as possible' with 'jinliang'
explanation: Expressing 'as much as possible' with 'jinliang'. Used for describing actions, expressing attitude.

examples.chinese: 我会尽量想办法帮你的。
examples.pinyin: wǒ hùi jǐnliàng xiǎng bànfǎ bāng nǐ de 。
examples.english: I will try my best to help you.

examples.chinese: 你看书吧，我尽量不打扰你。
examples.pinyin: nǐ kàn shū ba，wǒ jǐnliàng bù dǎrǎo nǐ 。
examples.english: You read a book, I try not to disturb you.

examples.chinese: 父母应该尽量多陪陪孩子。
examples.pinyin: fùmǔ yìnggāi jǐnliàng duō péi péi háizǐ 。
examples.english: Parents should accompany their children as much as possible.

examples.chinese: 你是哥哥，要尽量照顾好妹妹。
examples.pinyin: nǐ shì gēgē，yào jǐnliàng zhàogù hǎo mèimèi 。
examples.english: You are an elder brother, you should take good care of your sister as much as possible.

examples.chinese: 我们要尽量避免问这种问题，有的客户会感觉很不舒服。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen yào jǐnliàng bìmiǎn wèn zhè zhǒng wèntí，yǒude kèhù hùi gǎnjué hěnbùshūfú 。
examples.english: We should try to avoid asking this kind of question, some customers will feel very uncomfortable.

title: Expressing difficulty with 'hao (bu) rongyi'
structure: Subj. + 好容易 / 好不容易 + 才 + Verb，[Result Sentence]
explanation: Expressing difficulty with 'hao (bu) rongyi'. Used for expressing quality.

examples.chinese: 我们好不容易才做完这个项目，结果合同取消了。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen hǎobùróngyì cái zuòwán zhè gè xiàngmù，jiéguǒ hétóng qǔxiāo le 。
examples.english: We finally finished the project and the contract was cancelled.

examples.chinese: 我好不容易才到市中心，却发现没带手机，只好回去拿。
examples.pinyin: wǒ hǎobùróngyì cái dào shìzhōngxīn， què fāxiàn méi dài shǒujī，zhǐhǎo húiqù ná 。
examples.english: I finally got to the city center, but found that I didn't bring my cell phone with me, so I had to go back and get it.

examples.chinese: 金融危机之后他好不容易才找到工作，现在又辞职了。
examples.pinyin: jīnróng wēijī zhīhòu tā hǎobùróngyì cái zhǎodào gōngzuò，xiànzài yòu cízhí le 。
examples.english: After the financial crisis, he finally found a job, and now he resigned.

examples.chinese: 我好不容易才打通了银行的服务热线。
examples.pinyin: wǒ hǎobùróngyì cái dǎtōng le yínxíng de fúwù rèxiàn 。
examples.english: I finally got through the bank's service hotline.

examples.chinese: 他们好不容易才爬到了山顶，结果下起了大雨。
examples.pinyin: tāmen hǎobùróngyì cái pá dào le shāndǐng，jiéguǒ xiàqǐ le dàyǔ 。
examples.english: They finally climbed to the top of the mountain and it rained heavily.

title: Expressing 'each other' with 'huxiang'
explanation: Expressing 'each other' with 'huxiang'. Used for describing actions.

examples.chinese: 互相帮助
examples.pinyin: hùxiāng bāngzhù
examples.english: Help each other

examples.chinese: 互相了解
examples.pinyin: hùxiāng lejiě
examples.english: know each other

examples.chinese: 互相伤害
examples.pinyin: hùxiāng shānghài
examples.english: Hurt each other

examples.chinese: 互相尊重
examples.pinyin: hùxiāng zūnzhòng
examples.english: mutual respect

examples.chinese: 互相支持
examples.pinyin: hùxiāng zhīchí
examples.english: Support each other

title: Expressing 'feel free' with 'jinguan'
explanation: Expressing 'feel free' with 'jinguan'. Used for encouraging.

examples.chinese: 大家有话尽管说。
examples.pinyin: dàjiā yǒu huà jǐnguǎn shuō 。
examples.english: Everyone has something to say.

examples.chinese: 有什么问题尽管问。
examples.pinyin: yǒu shíyāo wèntí jǐnguǎn wèn 。
examples.english: Just ask any questions.

examples.chinese: 有什么事尽管找我。
examples.pinyin: yǒu shíyāo shì jǐnguǎn zhǎo wǒ 。
examples.english: Please come to me for anything.

examples.chinese: 这些饮料是免费的，尽管喝。
examples.pinyin: zhèxiē yǐnliào shì miǎnfèi de ， jǐnguǎn hē 。
examples.english: These drinks are free, despite drinking.

examples.chinese: 想吃什么尽管点，我请客。
examples.pinyin: xiǎng chī shíyāo jǐnguǎn diǎn ， wǒ qǐngkè 。
examples.english: I want to eat whatever I want.

title: Expressing 'have to' with budebu
explanation: Expressing 'have to' with budebu. Used for expressing attitude, expressing obligations.

examples.chinese: 我们都是打工的，不得不服从公司的安排。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen dū shì dǎgōngde ， bùdébù fúcóng gōngsī de ānpái 。
examples.english: We are all part-time workers and have to obey the company's arrangements.

examples.chinese: 你真的太厉害了，我不得不承认。
examples.pinyin: nǐ zhēnde tài lìhài le ， wǒ bùdébù chéngrèn 。
examples.english: You are really amazing, I have to admit.

examples.chinese: 电梯又坏了，我们不得不爬楼梯。
examples.pinyin: diàntī yòu huàile ， wǒmen bùdébù pálóutī 。
examples.english: The elevator broke down again and we had to climb the stairs.

examples.chinese: 你真会说话，这一点我们不得不佩服。
examples.pinyin: nǐ zhēn hùi shuōhuà ，zhèyīdiǎn wǒmen bùdébù pèifú 。
examples.english: You really talk, we have to admire this.

examples.chinese: 不好意思，时间有限，我不得不打断你。
examples.pinyin: bùhǎoyìsī ，shíjiān yǒuxiàn ，wǒ bùdébù dǎduàn nǐ 。
examples.english: Sorry, time is limited, I have to interrupt you.

title: Expressing 'just' do it with 'gancui'
explanation: Expressing 'just' do it with 'gancui'. Used for requesting.

examples.chinese: 家里什么都没有，干脆出去吃吧。
examples.pinyin: jiālǐshíyāodūméiyǒu，gāncùichūqùchība 。
examples.english: There is nothing at home, just go out and eat.

examples.chinese: 既然学不好，干脆别学了。
examples.pinyin: jìránxuébùhǎo，gāncùibiéxuéle 。
examples.english: Since you haven't learned well, just stop learning.

examples.chinese: 这台破电脑又坏了，干脆别修了，买台新的吧。
examples.pinyin: zhètáipòdiànnǎoyòuhuàile，gāncùibiéxīule，mǎitáixīndeba 。
examples.english: This broken computer is broken again. Don't fix it, just buy a new one.

examples.chinese: 苹果很贵，我干脆没买，只买了点香蕉。
examples.pinyin: píngguǒhěngùi，wǒgāncùiméimǎi，zhǐmǎilediǎnxiāngjiāo 。
examples.english: Apples are very expensive. I didn't buy them at all. I just bought some bananas.

title: Expressing 'nearly' with 'jihu'
structure: 几乎 + Subj. + 都 + Verb / Adj.
explanation: Expressing 'nearly' with 'jihu'. Used for expressing degree, expressing similarity.

examples.chinese: 几乎每个人都有手机。
examples.pinyin: jīhū měi gè rén dū yǒu shǒujī 。
examples.english: Almost everyone has a mobile phone.

examples.chinese: 在我们公司，几乎每个人都会说英文。
examples.pinyin: zài wǒmen gōngsī，jīhū měi gè rén dū hùi shuō yīngwén 。
examples.english: In our company, almost everyone speaks English.

examples.chinese: 在中国，几乎所有老外都会说“你好”。
examples.pinyin: zài zhōngguó，jīhū suǒyǒu lǎowài dū hùi shuō “nǐhǎo” 。
examples.english: In China, almost all foreigners will say "hello".

examples.chinese: 几乎所有人都相信他。
examples.pinyin: jīhū suǒyǒu rén dū xiāngxìn tā 。
examples.english: Almost everyone believed him.

examples.chinese: 几乎全世界的观众都喜欢这部电影。
examples.pinyin: jīhū quán shìjiè de guānzhòng dū xǐhuān zhè bù diànyǐng 。
examples.english: Almost all audiences around the world love this movie.

title: Expressing 'never again' with 'zai ye bu'
structure: Subj. + 再也 + 不 + Verb-Obj. + 了
explanation: Expressing 'never again' with 'zai ye bu'. Used for referring to the future, expressing time and date.

examples.chinese: 我再也不想看到你了！
examples.pinyin: wǒ zàiyěbù xiǎng kàndào nǐ le ！
examples.english: I don't want to see you anymore!

examples.chinese: 我再也不想跟你说话了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ zàiyěbù xiǎng gēn nǐ shuōhuà le 。
examples.english: I don't want to talk to you anymore.

examples.chinese: 我们再也不会相信你了！
examples.pinyin: wǒmen zàiyěbù hùi xiāngxìn nǐ le ！
examples.english: We will never trust you again!

examples.chinese: 医生说她再也不能跳舞了。
examples.pinyin: yìshēng shuō tāzàiyěbù néng tiàowǔ le 。
examples.english: The doctor said she could no longer dance.

examples.chinese: 我再也不要离开你了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ zàiyěbù yào líkāi nǐ le 。
examples.english: I will never leave you again.

title: Expressing 'once' with 'cengjing'
structure: Subj. + 曾经 + Verb + 过 (+ Obj.)
explanation: Expressing 'once' with 'cengjing'. Used for referring to the past, expressing time and date.

examples.chinese: 我们曾经一起去过。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen céngjīng yīqǐ qù guò 。
examples.english: We have been there together.

examples.chinese: 他说他曾经做过很多傻事。
examples.pinyin: tā shuō tā céngjīng zuò guò hěnduō shǎshì 。
examples.english: He said he had done many stupid things.

examples.chinese: 我曾经喜欢过你。
examples.pinyin: wǒ céngjīng xǐhuān guò nǐ 。
examples.english: I used to like you.

examples.chinese: 她曾经想当演员，后来成了全职太太。
examples.pinyin: tā céngjīng xiǎng dāng yǎnyuán ，hòulái chéng le quánzhítàitài 。
examples.english: She once wanted to be an actor, but later became a full-time wife.

examples.chinese: 为了找亲生父母，她曾经花了很多钱。
examples.pinyin: wèile zhǎo qīnshēng fùmǔ ，tā céngjīng huā le hěnduōqián 。
examples.english: In order to find her biological parents, she used to spend a lot of money.

title: Expressing 'over and over again' with 'zaisan'
explanation: Expressing 'over and over again' with 'zaisan'

examples.chinese: 老师再三强调这次考试对我们很重要。
examples.pinyin: lǎoshī zàisān qiángdiào zhè cì kǎoshì dùi wǒmen hěn zhòngyào 。
examples.english: The teacher repeatedly emphasized that this exam is very important to us.

examples.chinese: 中国政府再三警告美国不要干涉中国的内政。
examples.pinyin: zhōngguó zhèngfǔ zàisān jǐnggào měiguó bùyào gānshè zhōngguó de nèizhèng 。
examples.english: The Chinese government has repeatedly warned the United States not to interfere in China ’s internal affairs.

examples.chinese: 她再三犹豫之后，选择了放弃比赛。
examples.pinyin: tā zàisān yóuyù zhīhòu，xuǎnzé le fàngqì bǐsài 。
examples.english: After hesitating again and again, she chose to give up the game.

examples.chinese: 我们再三考虑过后，决定满足你的这个要求。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen zàisān kǎolv̀ guòhòu，juédìng mǎnzú nǐ de zhè gè yàoqíu 。
examples.english: After careful consideration, we decided to meet your request.

examples.chinese: 我再三提醒你出国旅游一定要小心你的钱包。
examples.pinyin: wǒ zàisān tíxǐng nǐ chūguó lv̌yóu yīdìng yào xiǎoxīn nǐ de qiánbāo 。
examples.english: I remind you again and again that you must be careful about your wallet when traveling abroad.

title: Expressing 'simply' with 'jianzhi'
explanation: Expressing 'simply' with 'jianzhi'. Used for expressing attitude, expressing quality.

examples.chinese: 他简直是个魔鬼！
examples.pinyin: tā jiǎnzhí shì gè mógǔi ！
examples.english: He is simply a devil!

examples.chinese: 他唱歌简直难听死了！
examples.pinyin: tā chànggē jiǎnzhí nántīng sǐle ！
examples.english: He sings so ugly!

examples.chinese: 你男朋友简直太帅了！
examples.pinyin: nǐ nán péngyǒu jiǎnzhí tài shuài le ！
examples.english: Your boyfriend is so handsome!

examples.chinese: 我简直不明白他为什么这么傻！
examples.pinyin: wǒ jiǎnzhí bù míngbái tā wèishíyāo zhèyāo shǎ ！
examples.english: I can't understand why he is so stupid!

examples.chinese: 我简直不知道怎么教这样的学生！
examples.pinyin: wǒ jiǎnzhí bù zhīdào zěnyāo jiào zhèyáng de xuéshēng ！
examples.english: I just don't know how to teach such students!

title: Expressing 'since the beginning' with 'yixiang'
structure: Subj. + 一向 + Habit / Attitude / etc.
explanation: Expressing 'since the beginning' with 'yixiang'. Used for referring to habitual actions, referring to the past, expressing frequency, expressing time and date.

examples.chinese: 他一向是个好学生，怎么可能会作弊呢？
examples.pinyin: tā yīxiàng shì gè hǎo xuéshēng，zěnyāo kěnéng hùi zuòbì ní ？
examples.english: He has always been a good student, how could he cheat?

examples.chinese: 中国人一向把红色视为吉祥喜庆的颜色。
examples.pinyin: zhōngguórén yīxiàng bǎ hóngsè shìwèi jíxiáng xǐqìng de yánsè 。
examples.english: The Chinese have always regarded red as an auspicious color.

examples.chinese: 云南的雨季一向来得很突然。
examples.pinyin: yúnnán de yǔjì yīxiàng lái dé hěn tūrán 。
examples.english: The rainy season in Yunnan has always been very sudden.

examples.chinese: 他的态度一向很认真。
examples.pinyin: tā de tàidù yīxiàng hěn rènzhēn 。
examples.english: His attitude has always been serious.

title: Expressing wasted efforts with 'bai'
explanation: Expressing wasted efforts with 'bai'. Used for describing actions, expressing attitude.

examples.chinese: 白花了一百块钱，这件衣服不能穿。
examples.pinyin: bái huā le yī bǎi kuài qián，zhè jiàn yīfú bù néng chuān 。
examples.english: Bai spent a hundred dollars, and this dress cannot be worn.

examples.chinese: 他不回来吃饭了？
examples.pinyin: tā bù húilái chīfàn le ？
examples.english: He is not coming back for dinner?

examples.chinese: 你一句汉语都不会说，白学了这么长时间。
examples.pinyin: nǐ yī jù hànyǔ dū bù hùi shuō，bái xué le zhèyāo cháng shíjiān 。
examples.english: You can't speak a single sentence of Chinese. Bai has studied for so long.

examples.chinese: 我去的时候他不在家，所以我白跑了一趟。
examples.pinyin: wǒ qù de shíhòu tā bù zài jiā， suǒyǐ wǒ bái pǎo le yī tàng 。
examples.english: He was not at home when I went, so I ran in vain.

examples.chinese: 不好意思，让你白忙了一个早上，我们老板今天来不了了。
examples.pinyin: bùhǎoyìsī， ràng nǐ bái máng le yī gè zǎoshàng，wǒmen lǎobǎn jīntiān lái bùle le 。
examples.english: Sorry, let you busy in the morning, our boss can not come today.

title: Expressing 'while you're at it' with 'shunbian'
explanation: Expressing 'while you're at it' with 'shunbian'. Used for describing actions.

examples.chinese: 你去买早饭的时候顺便帮我带杯咖啡吧。
examples.pinyin: nǐ qù mǎi zǎofàn de shíhòu shùnbiàn bāng wǒ dài bēi kāfēi ba 。
examples.english: Help me bring a cup of coffee when you go to buy breakfast.

examples.chinese: 你去超市能不能顺便帮我买一瓶牛奶？
examples.pinyin: nǐ qù chāoshì néng bù néng shùnbiàn bāng wǒ mǎi yī píng níunǎi ？
examples.english: Can you help me buy a bottle of milk by the way?

examples.chinese: 老板去见客户，顺便吃了午饭。
examples.pinyin: lǎobǎn qù jiàn kèhù，shùnbiàn chī le wǔfàn 。
examples.english: The boss went to meet the customer and had lunch by the way.

examples.chinese: 我下周去北京出差，顺便去看一个朋友。
examples.pinyin: wǒ xiàzhōu qù běijīng chūchà，shùnbiàn qù kàn yī gè péngyǒu 。
examples.english: I will go to Beijing for a business trip next week and stop by to see a friend.

examples.chinese: 我出门的时候都会顺便扔垃圾。
examples.pinyin: wǒ chūmén de shíhòu dū hùi shùnbiàn rēng lājí 。
examples.english: When I go out, I always throw garbage.

title: The opposite of 'chabuduo' is 'cha hen duo'
explanation: The opposite of 'chabuduo' is 'cha hen duo'. Used for comparing, expressing degree.

examples.chinese: 中西方的文化差很多。
examples.pinyin: zhōng xīfāng de wénhuà chà hěn duō 。
examples.english: Chinese and Western cultures are much different.

examples.chinese: 这两个词的意思差不多，但是用法差很多。
examples.pinyin: zhè liǎng gè cí de yìsī chàbùduō，dànshì yòngfǎ chà hěn duō 。
examples.english: The meaning of these two words is similar, but their usage is much different.

examples.chinese: 她和她老公的年龄差很多。
examples.pinyin: tā hé tā lǎogōng de niánlíng chà hěn duō 。
examples.english: She and her husband are much different in age.

examples.chinese: 公司今年的收入跟去年差很多。
examples.pinyin: gōngsī jīnnián de shōurù gēn qùnián chà hěn duō 。
examples.english: The company's revenue this year is much worse than last year.

examples.chinese: 这个服务员和经理的服务态度差很多。
examples.pinyin: zhègè fúwùyuán hé jīnglǐ de fúwù tàidù chà hěn duō 。
examples.english: The service attitude of this waiter and manager is much worse.

title: Listing things with 'a'
structure: A 啊， B 啊， C 啊⋯⋯
explanation: Listing things with 'a'. Used for expressing attitude, listing.

examples.chinese: 我们什么零食都有，花生啊，瓜子啊，薯片啊，你随便吃吧。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen shíyāo língshí dū yǒu，huāshēng a，guāzǐ a，shǔpiàn a，nǐ súibiàn chī ba 。
examples.english: We have all kinds of snacks, peanuts, melon seeds, potato chips, you can eat whatever you want.

examples.chinese: 椅子啊，桌子啊，电脑啊什么的都买好了，现在办公室只差招员工了！
examples.pinyin: yǐzǐ a，zhuōzǐ a，diànnǎo a shíyāode dū mǎi hǎo le，xiànzài bàngōngshì zhǐ chà zhāo yuángōng le！
examples.english: Chairs, desks, computers and everything have been bought, and now the office only has to hire staff!

examples.chinese: 《发展汉语》啊，《实用汉语课本》啊，我都学过，没用！
examples.pinyin: 《fāzhǎn hànyǔ》 a， 《shíyòng hànyǔ kèběn》 a，wǒ dū xué guò，méi yòng！
examples.english: "Development Chinese", "Practical Chinese Textbook", I have learned it, it is useless!

title: Expressing 'and' with 'he' (advanced)
explanation: Expressing 'and' with 'he' (advanced). Used for listing.

examples.chinese: 政府每年都会维护和修理这些建筑。
examples.pinyin: zhèngfǔ měinián dū hùi wéihù hé xīulǐ zhèxiē jiànzhú 。
examples.english: The government maintains and repairs these buildings every year.

examples.chinese: 我们需要进一步地了解和交流。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen xūyào jìnyībù dì lejiě hé jiāolíu 。
examples.english: We need to understand and communicate further.

examples.chinese: 他十八岁的时候就管理和运营着一家公司。
examples.pinyin: tā shíbāsùi de shíhòu jìu guǎnlǐ hé yùnyíng zháo yī jiā gōngsī 。
examples.english: He managed and operated a company when he was eighteen.

examples.chinese: 这种材料可以无限地回收和利用。
examples.pinyin: zhè zhǒng cáiliào kěyǐ wúxiàn dì húishōu hé lìyòng 。
examples.english: This material can be recycled and used indefinitely.

examples.chinese: 预防和治理污染需要所有人共同的努力。
examples.pinyin: yùfáng hé zhìlǐ wūrǎn xūyào suǒyǒu rén gòngtóng de nǔlì 。
examples.english: Prevention and treatment of pollution requires the joint efforts of all people.

title: Expressing 'how about' with 'yaobu'
structure: 要不 + Suggestion ，Reason / Situation  /  Reason / Situation ，要不 + Suggestion
explanation: Expressing 'how about' with 'yaobu'. Used for indicating cause and effect, giving alternatives.

examples.chinese: 大家都有点累了，要不休息一会儿吧。
examples.pinyin: dàjiā dū yǒudiǎn lèi le，yàobù xīuxī yīhùiér ba 。
examples.english: Everyone is a little tired, or have a rest.

examples.chinese: 要不我们一起去吧，一个人去没意思。
examples.pinyin: yàobù wǒmen yīqǐ qù ba ，yīgèrén qù méi yìsī 。
examples.english: Or should we go together, it ’s boring to go alone.

examples.chinese: 这个星期我比较忙，要不下个星期见？
examples.pinyin: zhègè xīngqī wǒ bǐjiào máng ，yàobù xià gè xīngqī jiàn ？
examples.english: I ’m busy this week. See you next week?

examples.chinese: 要不我们换个地方吧，这里太吵了。
examples.pinyin: yàobù wǒmen huàn gè dìfāng ba ，zhèlǐ tài chǎo le 。
examples.english: Or should we change places, it's too noisy here.

examples.chinese: 要不你先走吧，我还没做完。
examples.pinyin: yàobù nǐ xiān zǒu ba ，wǒ huánméi zuòwán 。
examples.english: Or you go first, I haven't finished it yet.

title: Comparing 'bici' and 'duifang'
explanation: Comparing 'bici' and 'duifang'

examples.chinese: 你们这样做其实是彼此伤害。
examples.pinyin: nǐmen zhèyáng zuò qíshí shì bǐcǐ shānghài 。
examples.english: You actually hurt each other by doing so.

examples.chinese: 结婚以前夫妻应该多花时间彼此了解。
examples.pinyin: jiéhūn yǐqián fūqī yìnggāi duō huā shíjiān bǐcǐ lejiě 。
examples.english: Before marriage, couples should spend more time understanding each other.

examples.chinese: 我们是一个部门的，工作上要彼此配合。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen shì yī gè bùmén de，gōngzuò shàng yào bǐcǐ pèihé 。
examples.english: We are a department, and we must cooperate with each other in our work.

examples.chinese: 如果你们不能彼此信任，这次合作不太可能成功。
examples.pinyin: rúguǒ nǐmen bù néng bǐcǐ xìnrèn，zhè cì hézuò bù tài kěnéng chénggōng 。
examples.english: If you cannot trust each other, this cooperation is unlikely to succeed.

examples.chinese: 照顾彼此。
examples.pinyin: zhàogù bǐcǐ 。
examples.english: Take care of each other.

title: Expressing 'among' with 'dangzhong'
structure: Group + 当中  /  Process + 当中
explanation: Expressing 'among' with 'dangzhong'. Used for describing actions, describing things.

examples.chinese: 你是我所有朋友当中最聪明的一个。
examples.pinyin: nǐ shì wǒ suǒyǒu péngyǒu dāngzhōng zùi cōngmíng de yī gè 。
examples.english: You are the smartest of all my friends.

examples.chinese: 在这一百个选手当中我表现得最出色。
examples.pinyin: zài zhè yībǎi gè xuǎnshǒu dāngzhōng wǒ biǎoxiàn dé zùi chūsè 。
examples.english: Among the 100 players, I performed the best.

examples.chinese: 这个工程还在计划当中。
examples.pinyin: zhè gè gōngchéng huánzài jìhuá dāngzhōng 。
examples.english: This project is still being planned.

title: Expressing 'each other' with 'bici'
structure: Verb + 彼此  /  彼此 + Verb
explanation: Expressing 'each other' with 'bici'

examples.chinese: 我们只见过一次，彼此不是很了解。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen zhǐ jiàn guò yī cì ，bǐcǐ bùshì hěn lejiě 。
examples.english: We have only seen it once and we don't know each other very well.

examples.chinese: 我们是一个团队，彼此应该多沟通。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen shì yīgè tuándùi ，bǐcǐ yìnggāi duō gōutōng 。
examples.english: We are a team and should communicate more with each other.

examples.chinese: 我很尊重我的对手，我希望彼此都能有好的表现。
examples.pinyin: wǒ hěn zūnzhòng wǒ de dùishǒu ，wǒ xīwàng bǐcǐ dū néng yǒu hǎo de biǎoxiàn 。
examples.english: I respect my opponents very much, and I hope each other can perform well.

examples.chinese: 我们是一家人，必须好好照顾彼此。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen shì yījiārén ，bìxū hǎohǎo zhàogù bǐcǐ 。
examples.english: We are a family and we must take good care of each other.

examples.chinese: 好朋友总是会陪伴彼此。
examples.pinyin: hǎopéngyǒu zǒngshì hùi péibàn bǐcǐ 。
examples.english: Good friends always accompany each other.

title: Expressing 'ever since' with 'yilai'
explanation: Expressing 'ever since' with 'yilai'. Used for referring to the past, sequencing events in time.

examples.chinese: 今年八月以来，这里一直没下过雨。
examples.pinyin: jīnnián bāyuè yǐlái ，zhèlǐ yīzhí méi xià guò yǔ 。
examples.english: It has not rained here since August this year.

examples.chinese: 结婚以来，我们没吵过架。
examples.pinyin: jiéhūn yǐlái ，wǒmen méi chǎo guò jià 。
examples.english: We haven't quarreled since we got married.

examples.chinese: 上大学以来，他变了很多。
examples.pinyin: shàng dàxué yǐlái ，tā biàn le hěn duō 。
examples.english: He has changed a lot since he went to college.

examples.chinese: 从他爸爸去世以来，他就没有回过家。
examples.pinyin: cóng tā bàbà qùshì yǐlái ，tā jìu méiyǒu húi guò jiā 。
examples.english: Since his father's death, he has not returned home.

examples.chinese: 从我学汉语以来，我认识了很多中国朋友。
examples.pinyin: cóng wǒ xué hànyǔ yǐlái ，wǒ rènshì le hěnduō zhōngguó péngyǒu 。
examples.english: Since I learned Chinese, I have met many Chinese friends.

title: Name-calling with 'zhege'
structure: Subj. + 这个 /  这种 / 这类 + [Category]
explanation: Name-calling with 'zhege'. Used for describing people, describing things, emphasizing, differentiating.

examples.chinese: 你这个坏蛋，就没做过一件好事。
examples.pinyin: nǐ zhègè huàidàn，jìu méi zuò guò yī jiàn hǎo shì 。
examples.english: You bad guy, never did a good thing.

examples.chinese: 他这个马屁精，又去拍老板的马屁了。
examples.pinyin: tā zhègè mǎpìjīng，yòu qù pāi lǎobǎn de mǎpì le 。
examples.english: He asshole, went to pat the boss's ass.

examples.chinese: 上海这个城市，夏天太热，冬天太冷。
examples.pinyin: shànghǎi zhègè chéngshì，xiàtiān tài rè，dōngtiān tài lěng 。
examples.english: The city of Shanghai is too hot in summer and too cold in winter.

examples.chinese: 猕猴桃这种水果，营养价值最高。
examples.pinyin: míhóutáo zhèzhǒng shǔiguǒ，yíngyǎng jiàzhí zùi gāo 。
examples.english: Kiwi fruit is the fruit with the highest nutritional value.

examples.chinese: 钱这种东西，可以有可以没有。
examples.pinyin: qián zhèzhǒng dōngxī，kěyǐ yǒu kěyǐ méiyǒu 。
examples.english: There is no such thing as money.

title: Advanced 'le' after an object
structure: Subj. + Verb + 了 + Obj.  /  Subj. + Verb + Obj. + 了
explanation: Advanced 'le' after an object. Used for describing actions, referring to the past, expressing completion.

examples.chinese: 我上了课。
examples.pinyin: wǒ shàng le kè 。
examples.english: I took the class.

examples.chinese: 老师问了问题。
examples.pinyin: lǎoshī wèn le wèntí 。
examples.english: The teacher asked a question.

examples.chinese: 他买了一辆车。
examples.pinyin: tā mǎi le yīliàng chē 。
examples.english: He bought a car.

examples.chinese: 妈妈做了很多菜。
examples.pinyin: māmā zuò le hěnduō cài 。
examples.english: Mom made many dishes.

examples.chinese: 我们吃了印度菜。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen chī le yìndù cài 。
examples.english: We had Indian food.

title: Advanced 'le' with complements
structure: Subj. + Verb + Complement + 了  /  Subj. + Verb + 了 + Complement
explanation: Advanced 'le' with complements. Used for describing actions, referring to the past, expressing completion.

examples.chinese: 买到了。
examples.pinyin: mǎi dào le 。
examples.english: bought.

examples.chinese: 做起来了。
examples.pinyin: zuò qǐlái le 。
examples.english: Do it.

examples.chinese: 吃完了。
examples.pinyin: chī wán le 。
examples.english: Finished.

examples.chinese: 穿好了。
examples.pinyin: chuān hǎo le 。
examples.english: Wear it.

examples.chinese: 用没了。
examples.pinyin: yòng méi le 。
examples.english: Useless.

title: Marking a topic with 'ma'
explanation: Marking a topic with 'ma'. Used for marking a topic.

examples.chinese: 大熊猫嘛，大家都喜欢。
examples.pinyin: dà xióngmāoma ，dàjiā dū xǐhuān 。
examples.english: Everyone likes giant pandas.

examples.chinese: 名牌嘛，一定不便宜。
examples.pinyin: míngpái ma ，yīdìng bù biànyí 。
examples.english: Well-known brand, certainly not cheap.

examples.chinese: 第一次嘛，以后就会了。
examples.pinyin: dì yī cì ma ，yǐhòu jìu hùi le 。
examples.english: The first time, it will be later.

examples.chinese: 孩子嘛，不懂这些很正常。
examples.pinyin: háizǐ ma ，bù dǒng zhèxiē hěn zhèngcháng 。
examples.english: Well, it ’s normal not to understand these things.

examples.chinese: 老板请客嘛，当然要大方。
examples.pinyin: lǎobǎn qǐngkè ma ，dāngrán yào dàfāng 。
examples.english: The boss treats guests, of course.

title: Softening the tone of questions with 'ne'
structure: Option 1 + 呢 + 还是 + Option 2 + 呢？
explanation: Softening the tone of questions with 'ne'. Used for expressing attitude.

examples.chinese: 我去缅甸呢，还是泰国呢？我得想一想！
examples.pinyin: wǒ qù miǎndiàn ní，huánshì tàiguóní ？wǒ dé xiǎng yī xiǎng！
examples.english: Should I go to Myanmar or Thailand? I have to think about it!

examples.chinese: 咱们打游戏呢，还是泡吧呢，我都可以！
examples.pinyin: zánmen dǎ yóuxì ní ，huánshì pàoba ní ，wǒ dū kěyǐ！
examples.english: Let's play the game, let's go clubbing.

examples.chinese: 这是谁的笔呢?
examples.pinyin: zhè shì shúi de bǐní?
examples.english: Whose pen is this?

examples.chinese: 他去哪儿了呢？
examples.pinyin: tā qù nǎér le ní ？
examples.english: Where did he go?

examples.chinese: 怎么会呢？
examples.pinyin: zěnyāo hùiní ？
examples.english: how could be?

title: Taiwanese 'you'
explanation: Taiwanese 'you'. Used for referring to the past, referring to past experiences.

examples.chinese: 我们有听懂你的话。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen yǒu tīngdǒng nǐ de huà 。
examples.english: We understand you.

examples.chinese: 我们都有听到宝宝哭。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen dū yǒu tīngdào bǎobǎo kū 。
examples.english: We all heard the baby cry.

examples.pinyin: wǒ yǒu kàndào tāmen chǎojià 。
examples.english: I have seen them quarreling.

examples.chinese: 他有学，而且很喜欢。
examples.pinyin: tā yǒu xué ，érqiě hěn xǐhuān 。
examples.english: He is academic and likes it very much.

examples.chinese: 我有吃，但是不太饿。
examples.pinyin: wǒ yǒu chī ，dànshì bùtài è 。
examples.english: I eat, but I'm not too hungry.

title: Defining scope
structure: 级别 / 次序 / 数目 + 以上 / 以下
explanation: Defining scope. Used for defining scope.

examples.chinese: 我老家空气还不错，PM2.5一般在五十以下。
examples.pinyin: wǒ lǎojiā kōngqì huán bùcuò，PM2.5 yībān zài wǔshí yǐxià 。
examples.english: The air in my hometown is not bad, PM2.5 is generally below fifty.

examples.pinyin: wǒmen xūyào yǒu liǎng nián yǐshàng gōngzuò jīngyàn de rén 。
examples.english: We need people with more than two years of work experience.

examples.chinese: 十岁以下的孩子不用买票。
examples.pinyin: shí sùi yǐxià de háizǐ bùyòng mǎi piào 。
examples.english: Children under ten years old do not need to buy tickets.

examples.chinese: 我们出差都住三星级以上的酒店。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen chūchà dū zhù sān xīngjí yǐshàng de jǐudiàn 。
examples.english: We are staying in hotels with more than three stars on business trips.

examples.chinese: 这里的冬天气温都在零度以下。
examples.pinyin: zhèlǐ de dōngtiān qìwēn dū zài língdù yǐxià 。
examples.english: Winter temperatures here are below zero.

title: Expressing 'ever since' with 'zicong'
structure: 自 / 从 / 自从 + Time / Event + 以来
explanation: Expressing 'ever since' with 'zicong'. Used for referring to the past, sequencing events in time.

examples.chinese: 从他爸爸去世以来，他一直没回过家。
examples.pinyin: cóng tā bàbà qùshì yǐlái ，tā yīzhí méi húi guò jiā 。
examples.english: Since his father's death, he has never returned home.

examples.chinese: 从毕业以来，她一直在教汉语。
examples.pinyin: cóng bìyè yǐlái，tā yīzhí zài jiào hànyǔ 。
examples.english: Since graduating, she has been teaching Chinese.

examples.chinese: 自改革开放以来，中国社会发生了巨大的变化。
examples.pinyin: zì gǎigé kāifàng yǐlái ，zhōngguó shèhùi fāshēng le jùdà de biànhuà 。
examples.english: Since the reform and opening up, great changes have taken place in Chinese society.

examples.pinyin: zìcóng mèimèi chūshēng yǐlái ，māmā jìu gèng máng le 。
examples.english: Since my sister was born, my mother has been busier.

examples.chinese: 自从来到湖南，我越来越能吃辣了。
examples.pinyin: zìcóng lái dào húnán，wǒ yuèláiyuè néng chī là le 。
examples.english: Since coming to Hunan, I have become more and more spicy.

title: Expressing 'for…' with 'eryan'
explanation: Expressing 'for…' with 'eryan'

examples.chinese: 对一个民族而言，团结可以战胜一切。
examples.pinyin: dùi yīgè mínzú éryán ，tuánjié kěyǐ zhànshèng yīqiē 。
examples.english: For a nation, unity can overcome everything.

examples.chinese: 对消费者而言，促销活动很有吸引力。
examples.pinyin: dùi xiāofèizhě éryán ，cùxiāo huódòng hěn yǒu xīyǐnlì 。
examples.english: For consumers, promotional activities are very attractive.

examples.pinyin: dùi 80hòu éryán ，wǎngliàn hěn zhèngcháng 。
examples.english: For the post-80s, online dating is normal.

title: Expressing 'for' with 'wei'
explanation: Expressing 'for' with 'wei'. Used for expressing purpose.

examples.chinese: 我们都为你高兴。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen dū wèi nǐ gāoxīng 。
examples.english: We are all happy for you.

examples.chinese: 谁为我考虑过？
examples.pinyin: shúi wèi wǒ kǎolv̀ guò ？
examples.english: Who considered it for me?

examples.chinese: 你们可以来为我们加油。
examples.pinyin: nǐmen kěyǐ lái wèi wǒmen jiāyóu 。
examples.english: You can come and cheer for us.

examples.pinyin: tā shì wèi měiguó zhèngfǔ gōngzuò de 。

title: Expressing 'including' with 'zainei'
explanation: Expressing 'including' with 'zainei'. Used for expressing quantity.

examples.chinese: 包括他的母语在内，他会说四种语言。

examples.pinyin: shǔidiànfèi zàinèi ，wǒ měi gè yuè de fángzū sānqiān wǔ 。
examples.english: Including water and electricity bills, my monthly rent is 35,000.

examples.chinese: 这次袭击造成了三人死亡，包括两名警察在内。
examples.pinyin: zhè cì xíjí zàochéng le sānrén sǐwáng ，bāokuò liǎng míng jǐngchá zàinèi 。
examples.english: The attack killed three people, including two police officers.

examples.pinyin: xiǎomǐ hùi zài xiàgèyuè fābù bāokuò xiǎomǐ diànshì zàinèi de jī gè xīnchǎnpǐn 。
examples.english: Xiaomi will release several new products including Xiaomi TV next month.

title: Expressing 'on the basis of' with 'ping'
explanation: Expressing 'on the basis of' with 'ping'. Used for adding more explanation.

examples.chinese: 凭护照，外国人可以买火车票。
examples.pinyin: píng hùzhào， wàiguó rén kěyǐ mǎi huǒchē piào 。
examples.english: With a passport, foreigners can buy train tickets.

examples.pinyin: tā píng zìjǐ de nǔlì xué le sānqiān duō gè hànzì 。
examples.english: He learned more than three thousand Chinese characters with his own efforts.
