examples.pinyin: wǒmen píng xuéshēngzhèng zài diànyǐngyuàn xiǎngshòu zhékòu yōudài 。
examples.english: We use the student ID to enjoy discounts at the cinema.

examples.chinese: 怪不得那个孩子的数学不好，他只凭计算器算。
examples.pinyin: guàibùdé nà gè háizǐ de shùxué bù hǎo，tā zhǐ píng jìsuànqì suàn 。
examples.english: No wonder that child's math is not good, he only counts on a calculator.

examples.chinese: 学好跳舞不能只凭看迈克尔·杰克逊的音乐录像带，还得凭自己的努力。
examples.pinyin: xuéhǎo tiàowǔ bù néng zhǐ píng kàn màikèěr·jiékèxùn de yīnlè lùxiàngdài， huán dé píng zìjǐ de nǔlì 。
examples.english: Learning to dance well depends not only on Michael Jackson ’s music video but also on your own efforts.

title: Expressing passive voice with 'gei'
structure: Receiver + 给 + The Doer + Verb Phrase
explanation: Expressing passive voice with 'gei'. Used for expressing passive voice.

examples.chinese: 我给他骗了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ gěi tā piàn le 。
examples.english: I lied to him.

examples.chinese: 这么好的机会给你浪费了。
examples.pinyin: zhèyāo hǎo de jīhùi gěi nǐ làngfèi le 。
examples.english: Such a good opportunity is wasted for you.

examples.chinese: 菜都给你们吃完了吗？
examples.pinyin: cài dū gěi nǐmen chī wánle ma ？
examples.english: Have you finished the dishes?

examples.chinese: 孩子都给你宠坏了。
examples.pinyin: háizǐ dū gěi nǐ chǒng huài le 。
examples.english: The kids are spoiled for you.

examples.chinese: 这里的水都给污染了。
examples.pinyin: zhèlǐ de shǔi dū gěi wūrǎn le 。
examples.english: The water here is polluted.

title: Expressing 'with regards to' with 'zhiyu'
explanation: Expressing 'with regards to' with 'zhiyu'. Used for adding more explanation, connecting ideas.

examples.chinese: 我已经尽力了，至于结果只能看运气了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ yǐjīng jǐnlì le，zhìyú jiéguǒ zhǐ néng kàn yùnqì le 。
examples.english: I have tried my best, as for the result, I can only look at luck.

examples.chinese: 她跟我说明天回来，至于具体的时间，我就不知道了。
examples.pinyin: tā gēn wǒ shuō míngtiān húilái，zhìyú jùtǐ de shíjiān，wǒ jìu bù zhīdào le 。
examples.english: She explained to me that when the day came back, as for the specific time, I would not know.

examples.chinese: 律师只能为他的客户辩护，至于最后的判决，那就取决于法官了。
examples.pinyin: lv̀shī zhǐnéng wèitā de kèhù biànhù，zhìyú zùihòu de pànjué，nà jìu qǔjuéyú fǎguān le 。
examples.english: The lawyer can only defend his client. As for the final judgment, it depends on the judge.

title: Limiting scope with 'jiu'
structure: Subj. + 就 + 活动的对象或者范围 + Verb + Obj.
explanation: Limiting scope with 'jiu'

examples.chinese: 大家就中国互联网的发展发表了各自的看法。
examples.pinyin: dàjiā jìu zhōngguóhùliánwǎngdefāzhǎnfābiǎolegèzìdekànfǎ 。
examples.english: Everyone expressed their views on the development of China's Internet.

examples.chinese: 中国主席就中国最近的经济改革做了发言。
examples.pinyin: zhōngguózhǔxí jìu zhōngguózùijìndejīngjìgǎigézuòlefāyán 。
examples.english: The Chinese President made a statement on China's recent economic reforms.

examples.chinese: 来自各国的教育学者们就什么是最好的教育方法进行了激烈的讨论。
examples.pinyin: láizìgèguódejiàoyùxuézhěmen jìu shíyāoshìzùihǎodejiàoyùfāngfǎjìnxínglejīlièdetǎolùn 。
examples.english: Educational scholars from all over the world have heated discussions on what is the best educational method.

examples.chinese: 就中国的独生子女政策而言，专家各有各的看法。
examples.pinyin: jìu zhōngguó de dúshēngzǐnv̌ zhèngcè éryán，zhuānjiā gè yǒu gè de kànfǎ 。
examples.english: As far as China's one-child policy is concerned, experts have different opinions.

examples.chinese: 就文化大革命而言，大部分的人都认为那是一场灾难。
examples.pinyin: jìu wénhuàdàgémìng éryán，dàbùfēn de rén dū rènwèi nà shì yī cháng zāinán 。
examples.english: As far as the Cultural Revolution is concerned, most people think it is a disaster.

title: Opportune timing with 'chen'
explanation: Opportune timing with 'chen'. Used for indicating conditions, indicating cause and effect.

examples.chinese: 趁年轻，多去玩玩吧。
examples.pinyin: chèn niánqīng，duō qù wánwán ba 。
examples.english: While young, go play more.

examples.chinese: 趁天气好，我要去野餐。
examples.pinyin: chèn tiānqì hǎo，wǒ yào qù yěcān 。
examples.english: While the weather is good, I'm going to have a picnic.

examples.chinese: 趁老板不在，我们抽一会儿烟吧。
examples.pinyin: chèn lǎobǎn bù zài，wǒmen chōu yīhùi ér yān ba 。
examples.english: Let's smoke for a while while the boss is away.

examples.chinese: 趁孩子睡着的时候，我洗了很多衣服。
examples.pinyin: chèn háizǐ shùizháo de shíhòu，wǒ xǐ le hěn duō yīfú 。
examples.english: While the child was asleep, I washed a lot of clothes.

examples.chinese: 小偷一定是趁我不注意的时候，把我的手机偷走的。
examples.pinyin: xiǎotōu yīdìng shì chèn wǒ bùzhùyì de shíhòu ，bǎ wǒ de shǒujī tōuzǒu de 。
examples.english: The thief must have stolen my phone while I was not paying attention.

title: Expressing 'if it were not for' with 'yaobushi'
explanation: Expressing 'if it were not for' with 'yaobushi'. Used for indicating conditions, expressing possibility.

examples.chinese: 要不是她帮忙，我们不可能这么快找到这个地方。
examples.pinyin: yàobùshì tā bāngmáng，wǒmen bùkěnéng zhèyāo kuài zhǎodào zhè gè dìfāng 。
examples.english: Without her help, we could not find this place so quickly.

examples.chinese: 要不是你说你想吃，我不会做这个菜的。
examples.pinyin: yàobùshì nǐ shuō nǐ xiǎng chī，wǒ bù hùi zuò zhè gè cài de 。
examples.english: If you said you wanted to eat, I wouldn't make this dish.

examples.chinese: 要不是因为他是你朋友，我是不会帮他的。
examples.pinyin: yàobùshì yīnwèi tā shì nǐ péngyǒu，wǒ shì bù hùi bāng tā de 。
examples.english: If it were not for his friend, I would not help him.

examples.chinese: 要不是你们迟到的话，我们早就到了。
examples.pinyin: yàobùshì nǐmen chídào dehuà，wǒmen zǎo jìu dào le 。
examples.english: If it were not for you to be late, we would have arrived long ago.

examples.chinese: 要不是你刚才说错话，他是不会生气的。
examples.pinyin: yàobùshì nǐ gāngcái shuō cuò huà，tā shì bù hùi shēngqì de 。
examples.english: He would not be angry unless you said the wrong thing just now.

title: Expressing 'thanks to' with 'duokui'
explanation: Expressing 'thanks to' with 'duokui'. Used for expressing attitude.

examples.chinese: 我能这么快做完，多亏了你帮我。
examples.pinyin: wǒ néng zhèyāo kuài zuòwán ，duōyúle nǐ bāng wǒ 。
examples.english: I can finish it so quickly, thanks to you for helping me.

examples.chinese: 我没迟到，多亏了你开车送我。
examples.pinyin: wǒ méi chídào ，duōyúle nǐ kāichē sòng wǒ 。
examples.english: I was not late, thanks to you driving me.

examples.chinese: 多亏了你开车送我，我才没迟到。
examples.pinyin: duōyúle nǐ kāichē sòng wǒ ，wǒ cái méi chídào 。
examples.english: Thanks to you driving me, I was not late.

examples.chinese: 多亏你的伞，我才没淋湿。
examples.pinyin: duōyú nǐ de sǎn ，wǒ cái méi línshī 。
examples.english: Thanks to your umbrella, I didn't get wet.

examples.chinese: 多亏你帮我，我才能这么快做完。
examples.pinyin: duōyú nǐ bāng wǒ，wǒ cái néng zhèyāo kuài zuòwán 。
examples.english: Thanks to your help, I can finish it so quickly.

title: Expressing 'that's all' with 'eryi'
explanation: Expressing 'that's all' with 'eryi'. Used for emphasizing a point.

examples.chinese: 他只是开个玩笑而已，不要当真。
examples.pinyin: tā zhǐ shì kāi gè wánxiào éryǐ，bù yào dāng zhēn 。
examples.english: He is just kidding, don't take it seriously.

examples.chinese: 你才喝了一瓶啤酒而已，怎么会喝醉了呢？
examples.pinyin: nǐ cái hē le yī píng píjǐu éryǐ，zěnyāo hùi hē zùi le ní ？
examples.english: You only drank a bottle of beer, how come you are drunk?

examples.chinese: 这次会议没有达成具体的方案，仅仅是在这个问题上达成了共识而已。
examples.pinyin: zhè cì hùiyì méiyǒu dáchéng jùtǐ de fāngàn，jǐnjǐn shì zài zhè gè wèntí shàng dáchéng le gòngshì éryǐ 。
examples.english: No specific plan was reached at this meeting, only a consensus was reached on this issue.

examples.chinese: 这辆车没什么特别，它就是辆普通的汽车而已。
examples.pinyin: zhè liàng chē méi shíyāo tèbié，tā jìu shì liàng pǔtōng de qìchē éryǐ 。
examples.english: This car is nothing special, it is just an ordinary car.

title: Challenging a verb with 'shenme'
explanation: Challenging a verb with 'shenme'. Used for expressing attitude, expressing quality.

examples.chinese: 离什么婚！你们结婚才三个月。
examples.pinyin: lí shíyāo hūn ！nǐmen jiéhūncái sān gè yuè 。
examples.english: What a divorce! You have only been married for three months.

examples.chinese: 道什么歉啊，又不是你的错。
examples.pinyin: dào shíyāo qiàn a ，yòu bù shì nǐ de cuò 。
examples.english: What an apology is not your fault.

examples.chinese: 开什么玩笑啊，你撞了我，我还要跟你说“对不起”？
examples.pinyin: kāi shíyāo wánxiào a ，nǐ zhuàng le wǒ ，wǒ huányào gēn nǐ shuō “dùibùqǐ” ？
examples.english: What a joke, you hit me, and I have to say "sorry" to you?

examples.chinese: 没有钱看什么电影。
examples.pinyin: méiyǒu qián kàn shíyāo diànyǐng 。
examples.english: No money to watch any movies.

examples.chinese: 还吃什么早饭啊，要迟到了。
examples.pinyin: huán chī shíyāo zǎofàn a ，yào chídào le 。
examples.english: What kind of breakfast do you have to be late?

title: Comparing specifically with 'xiang'
structure: Noun 1 + 像 + Noun 2 + 一样 + Adj. / Verb
explanation: Comparing specifically with 'xiang'. Used for comparing.

examples.chinese: 她有时候像小孩一样天真。
examples.pinyin: tā yǒushíhòu xiàng xiǎohái yīyáng tiānzhēn 。
examples.english: She is sometimes naive like a child.

examples.chinese: 这个老外的汉语像中国人一样地道。
examples.pinyin: zhègè lǎowài de hànyǔ xiàng zhōngguórényīyáng dìdào 。
examples.english: The foreigner's Chinese is as authentic as the Chinese.

examples.chinese: 他很生气，像疯子一样大叫起来。
examples.pinyin: tā hěn shēngqì ，xiàng fēngzǐ yīyáng dà jiào qǐlái 。
examples.english: He was angry and yelled like a lunatic.

examples.chinese: 你怎么像我妈一样啰嗦！
examples.pinyin: nǐ zěnyāo xiàng wǒ mā yīyáng luōsuō ！
examples.english: Why are you as verbose as my mother!

examples.chinese: 上海的冬天不像北京那么干。
examples.pinyin: shànghǎi de dōngtiān bù xiàng běijīng nàyāo gān 。
examples.english: Winter in Shanghai is not as dry as in Beijing.

title: Comparisons with 'biqi'
explanation: Comparisons with 'biqi'. Used for comparing.

examples.chinese: 比起上海，我老家的物价便宜多了。
examples.pinyin: bǐqǐshànghǎi ，wǒ lǎojiā de wùjià biànyí duō le 。
examples.english: Compared to Shanghai, the price in my hometown is much cheaper.

examples.chinese: 本科生比起博士生来，学位要低很多。
examples.pinyin: běnkēshēng bǐqǐ bóshìshēng lái，xuéwèi yào dī hěn duō 。
examples.english: Undergraduates have much lower degrees than doctoral students.

examples.chinese: 相比几十年前，中国的农村发生了很大变化。
examples.pinyin: xiāngbǐ jīshí nián qián ，zhōngguó de nóngcūn fāshēng le hěn dà biànhuà 。
examples.english: Compared with decades ago, China's rural areas have undergone great changes.

examples.chinese: 与几十年前相比，中国的农村发生了很大变化。
examples.pinyin: yǔ jīshí nián qián xiāngbǐ，zhōngguó de nóngcūn fāshēng le hěn dà biànhuà 。
examples.english: Compared with a few decades ago, great changes have taken place in China's rural areas.

examples.chinese: 相比网络广告，平面广告贵很多。
examples.pinyin: xiāngbǐ wǎngluò guǎnggào ，píngmiàn guǎnggào gùi hěn duō 。
examples.english: Compared to online advertising, print advertising is much more expensive.

title: Comparisons with 'buru'
explanation: Comparisons with 'buru'. Used for denying and refusing, comparing.

examples.chinese: 我哥的成绩不如我。
examples.pinyin: wǒ gē de chéngjī bùrú wǒ 。
examples.english: My brother's grades are not as good as mine.

examples.chinese: 看电影不如看原著。
examples.pinyin: kàn diànyǐng bùrú kàn yuánzhù 。
examples.english: Watching the movie is worse than watching the original.

examples.chinese: 他总是觉得自己不如别人。
examples.pinyin: tā zǒngshì juédé zìjǐ bùrú biérén 。
examples.english: He always feels inferior to others.

examples.chinese: 这件裙子不如那件好看。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiàn qúnzǐ bùrú nà jiàn hǎokàn 。
examples.english: This skirt is not as good-looking as that one.

examples.chinese: 那个说法不如这个说法实用。
examples.pinyin: nàgè shuōfǎ bùrú zhègè shuōfǎ shíyòng 。
examples.english: That statement is not as practical as this one.

title: Making '-ize' and '-ify' verbs with 'hua'
explanation: Making '-ize' and '-ify' verbs with 'hua'. Used for describing actions.

examples.chinese: 现代化
examples.pinyin: xiàndàihuà
examples.english: modernization

examples.chinese: 中国化
examples.pinyin: zhōngguóhuà
examples.english: Chinese Characteristics

examples.chinese: 美国化
examples.pinyin: měiguóhuà
examples.english: Americanization

examples.chinese: KFC的中国本土化经营做得非常成功。
examples.pinyin: KFC de zhōngguó běntǔhuà jīngyíng zuò dé fēicháng chénggōng 。
examples.english: KFC's localized operation in China has been very successful.

examples.chinese: 邓小平提出了四个现代化：工业现代化、农业现代化、国防现代化、科学技术现代化。
examples.pinyin: dèngxiǎopíng tíchūle sì gè xiàndàihuà：gōngyèxiàndàihuà、nóngyèxiàndàihuà、guófángxiàndàihuà、kēxuéjìzhúxiàndàihuà 。
examples.english: Deng Xiaoping proposed four modernizations: industrial modernization, agricultural modernization, national defense modernization, and science and technology modernization.

title: Making judgments with 'suan'
explanation: Making judgments with 'suan'. Used for adding more explanation, expressing quality.

examples.chinese: 她算天才。
examples.pinyin: tā suàn tiāncái 。
examples.english: She is a genius.

examples.chinese: 这算秘密吗？
examples.pinyin: zhè suàn mìmì ma ？
examples.english: Is this a secret?

examples.chinese: 她算不算你女朋友？
examples.pinyin: tā suàn bù suàn nǐ nv̌péngyǒu ？
examples.english: Is she your girlfriend?

examples.chinese: 美国的中国菜算中国菜吗？
examples.pinyin: měiguó de zhōngguó cài suàn zhōngguó cài ma ？
examples.english: Is American Chinese food considered Chinese?

examples.chinese: 我们认识，但是不算朋友。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen rènshì ，dànshì bù suàn péngyǒu 。
examples.english: We know, but not friends.

title: Using 'nanguai' as a verb
explanation: Using 'nanguai' as a verb. Used for expressing attitude.

examples.chinese: 难怪他，他还是个孩子呢，什么都不懂。
examples.pinyin: nánguài tā，tā huán shì gè háizǐ ní，shíyāo dū bù dǒng 。
examples.english: No wonder he, he is a child, knows nothing.

examples.chinese: 这也难怪你，第一次到这个地方还不了解这里的风俗。
examples.pinyin: zhè yě nánguàinǐ，dì yī cì dào zhè gè dìfāng huán bù lejiě zhèlǐ de fēngsú 。
examples.english: It ’s no wonder that you did n’t understand the customs here for the first time.

examples.chinese: 这也难怪，他刚来嘛，算了算了。
examples.pinyin: zhè yě nánguài，tāgāngláima，suànlesuànle 。
examples.english: It's no wonder, he just came, forget it.

title: Expressing future with 'jiang'
structure: Subj. + 将 / 将要 / 将会 + [Verb Phrase]
explanation: Expressing future with 'jiang'. Used for referring to the future, sequencing events in time.

examples.chinese: 这次世界杯将在莫斯科举行。
examples.pinyin: zhè cì shìjièbēi jiāng zài mòsīkē jǔxíng 。
examples.english: The World Cup will be held in Moscow.

examples.chinese: 比赛结果将在月底公布。
examples.pinyin: bǐsài jiéguǒ jiāng zài yuèdǐ gōngbù 。
examples.english: The results of the competition will be announced at the end of the month.

examples.chinese: 他将会成为一个成功的企业家。
examples.pinyin: tā jiāng hùi chéngwèi yī gè chénggōng de qǐyèjiā 。
examples.english: He will become a successful entrepreneur.

examples.chinese: 如果政府不批准，我们将会举行抗议。
examples.pinyin: rúguǒ zhèngfǔ bù pīzhǔn ，wǒmen jiāng hùi jǔxíng kàngyì 。
examples.english: If the government does not approve, we will hold a protest.

examples.chinese: 这个政策将会大大改善农民的收入。
examples.pinyin: zhègè zhèngcè jiāng hùi dàdà gǎishàn nóngmín de shōurù 。
examples.english: This policy will greatly improve farmers' income.

title: The use of Taiwanese Mandarin 'hui'
explanation: The use of Taiwanese Mandarin 'hui'. Used for referring to the future, expressing possibility.

examples.chinese: 你会冷吗？
examples.pinyin: nǐ hùi lěng ma ？
examples.english: Will you be cold?

examples.chinese: 这个会辣吗？
examples.pinyin: zhègè hùi là ma ？
examples.english: Will this be spicy?

title: Expressing 'hard to avoid' with 'nanmian'
explanation: Expressing 'hard to avoid' with 'nanmian'. Used for expressing quality.

examples.chinese: 刚开始说外语时难免会有一些误会。
examples.pinyin: gāng kāishǐ shuō wàiyǔ shí nánmiǎn hùi yǒu yīxiē wùhùi 。
examples.english: There are some misunderstandings when I first speak a foreign language.

examples.chinese: 年轻人难免会遇到挫折，关键是学习怎么样克服。
examples.pinyin: niánqīng rén nánmiǎn hùi yùdào cuòzhé，guānjiàn shì xuéxí zěnyāoyáng kèfú 。
examples.english: Young people will inevitably encounter setbacks, the key is to learn how to overcome them.

examples.chinese: 第一次坐飞机出国难免会有点兴奋。
examples.pinyin: dì yī cì zuò fēijī chūguó nánmiǎn hùi yǒudiǎn xīngfèn 。
examples.english: It is inevitable that I will be a little excited to go abroad for the first time.

examples.chinese: 现在是高峰期，地铁难免会拥挤。
examples.pinyin: xiànzài shì gāofēngqī，dìtiě nánmiǎn hùi yǒngjǐ 。
examples.english: This is the peak period and the subway will inevitably be crowded.

examples.chinese: 这家公司的实习生难免要做一些打杂的事。
examples.pinyin: zhèjiā gōngsī de shíxíshēng nánmiǎn yào zuò yīxiē dǎzá de shì 。
examples.english: Interns in this company will inevitably do some chores.

title: Facilitating an outcome with 'yibian'
explanation: Facilitating an outcome with 'yibian'. Used for expressing purpose.

examples.chinese: 我国提倡垃圾分类，以便回收再利用。
examples.pinyin: wǒguó tíchàng lājí fēnlèi，yǐbiàn húishōu zàilìyòng 。
examples.english: Our country promotes garbage classification for recycling.

examples.chinese: 老李买了一辆折叠式的自行车，以便携带。
examples.pinyin: lǎolǐ mǎi le yī liàng zhédié shì de zìxíngchē，yǐbiàn xiédài 。
examples.english: Lao Li bought a folding bicycle for easy carrying.

examples.chinese: 老师减慢了语速，以便学生能听懂。
examples.pinyin: lǎoshī jiǎnmàn le yǔsù，yǐbiàn xuéshēng néng tīngdǒng 。
examples.english: The teacher slowed down his speech so that the students could understand.

title: Passive verbs with 'shou'
explanation: Passive verbs with 'shou'. Used for describing actions, expressing passive voice.

examples.chinese: 张老师的课很受学生的欢迎。
examples.pinyin: zhānglǎoshīdekè hěn shòu xuéshēng de huānyíng 。
examples.english: Teacher Zhang's class is very popular with students.

examples.chinese: 一个人不一定要变得很有钱或者很成功才会受人尊重。
examples.pinyin: yīgèrén bùyīdìng yào biàndé hěn yǒuqián huòzhě hěn chénggōng cái hùi shòu rén zūnzhòng 。
examples.english: A person does not have to be rich or successful to be respected.

examples.chinese: 中国政府受老百姓的批评。
examples.pinyin: zhōngguó zhèngfǔ shòulǎobǎixìngdepīpíng 。
examples.english: The Chinese government has been criticized by the common people.

examples.chinese: 受冷空气的影响，今天上海特别冷。
examples.pinyin: shòu lěng kōngqì de yǐngxiǎng，jīntiān shànghǎi tèbié lěng 。
examples.english: Affected by the cold air, Shanghai is particularly cold today.

examples.chinese: 你的手机昨晚一直打不通，我想应该是受信号干扰。
examples.pinyin: nǐ de shǒujī zuówǎn yīzhí dǎbùtōng，wǒ xiǎng yìnggāi shì shòu xìnhào gānrǎo 。
examples.english: Your phone has been unavailable last night, I think it should be interfered by the signal.

title: Expressing 'especially' with 'gewai'
explanation: Expressing 'especially' with 'gewai'. Used for expressing especially, expressing emphasis.

examples.chinese: 下过雨的早晨格外舒服.
examples.pinyin: xiàguòyǔdezǎochéngéwàishūfú.
examples.english: The rainy morning is particularly comfortable.

examples.chinese: 今天格外忙,都来不及吃午饭.
examples.pinyin: jīntiāngéwàimáng, dūláibùjíchīwǔfàn.
examples.english: It's so busy today that it's too late to have lunch.

examples.chinese: 昨天登山累了,晚上睡得格外香甜.
examples.pinyin: zuótiāndēngshānlèile, wǎnshàngshùidégéwàixiāngtián.
examples.english: I was tired from climbing yesterday and I slept very sweetly at night.

title: Expressing 'on the contrary' with 'fan'er'
explanation: Expressing 'on the contrary' with 'fan'er'. Used for denying and refusing, contrasting.

examples.chinese: 我帮了她，她反而生气了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ bāng le tā ， tā fǎnér shēngqì le 。
examples.english: I helped her, but she was angry.

examples.chinese: 他没有放弃，反而更努力了！
examples.pinyin: tā méiyǒu fàngqì ，fǎnér gèng nǔlì le ！
examples.english: He did not give up, but worked harder!

examples.chinese: 改革反而让老百姓更不满意了。
examples.pinyin: gǎigé fǎnér ràng lǎobǎixìng gèng bù mǎnyì le 。
examples.english: Instead, the reform made the people more dissatisfied.

examples.chinese: 吃了这个药，病反而更严重了。
examples.pinyin: chī le zhègè yào ，bìng fǎnér gèng yánzhòng le 。
examples.english: After taking this medicine, the disease became worse.

examples.chinese: 你的参与反而给我们带来了麻烦。
examples.pinyin: nǐ de cānyǔ fǎnér gěi wǒmen dàilái le máfán 。
examples.english: Instead, your participation has caused us trouble.

title: Stating the effect before the cause
structure: 之所以 ⋯⋯ ，是 + 因为 / 为了 / 想 ⋯⋯
explanation: Stating the effect before the cause. Used for sequencing events in time, indicating cause and effect.

examples.chinese: 她之所以问这么多是因为她关心你们。
examples.pinyin: tā zhī suǒyǐ wèn zhèyāo duō shì yīnwèi tā guānxīn nǐmen 。
examples.english: The reason why she asks so much is because she cares about you.

examples.chinese: 我之所以没告诉你是不想让你担心。
examples.pinyin: wǒ zhī suǒyǐ méi gàosù nǐ shì bù xiǎng ràng nǐ dànxīn 。
examples.english: The reason why I didn't tell you is that I don't want to worry you.

examples.chinese: 他之所以放弃了那份工作是因为他找到了更好的机会。
examples.pinyin: tā zhī suǒyǐ fàngqì le nàfèn gōngzuò shì yīnwèi tā zhǎodào le gènghǎo de jīhùi 。
examples.english: He gave up that job because he found a better opportunity.

examples.chinese: 我们之所以保密是想给她一个惊喜。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen zhī suǒyǐ bǎomì shì xiǎng gěi tā yī gè liángxǐ 。
examples.english: The reason we keep it secret is to surprise her.

examples.chinese: 公司之所以花钱培训你们是想让你们越来越专业。
examples.pinyin: gōngsī zhī suǒyǐ huāqián péixùn nǐmen shì xiǎng ràng nǐmen yuèláiyuè zhuānyè 。
examples.english: The reason why the company spends money to train you is to make you more and more professional.

title: Using 'because' with 'er' to indicate effect
structure: Subj. + 因(为) + Cause + 而 + Result
explanation: Using 'because' with 'er' to indicate effect. Used for indicating conditions, sequencing events in time, indicating cause and effect.

examples.chinese: 我因为生病而请假。
examples.pinyin: wǒ yīnwèi shēngbìng ér qǐngjiǎ 。
examples.english: I took leave because I was sick.

examples.chinese: 欧洲的经济因为债务危机而陷入衰退。
examples.pinyin: ōuzhōu de jīngjì yīnwèi zhàiwù wēijī ér xiànrù shuāitùi 。
examples.english: The European economy has fallen into recession because of the debt crisis.

examples.chinese: 首相因为受贿丑闻而下了台。
examples.pinyin: shǒuxiāng yīnwèi shòuhùi chǒuwén ér xià le tái 。
examples.english: The prime minister stepped down because of the bribery scandal.

examples.chinese: 伦敦地铁因罢工而处于瘫痪状态。
examples.pinyin: lúndūn dìtiě yīn bàgōng ér chùyú tānhuàn zhuàngtài 。
examples.english: The London Underground was paralyzed by the strike.

title: Advanced degree complements
structure: Adj. + 得 + 很 / 不得了 / 要命 / 不行
explanation: Advanced degree complements. Used for expressing degree.

examples.chinese: 这个孩子自私得很。
examples.pinyin: zhègè háizǐ zìsī déhěn 。
examples.english: The child is very selfish.

examples.chinese: 我老婆的工作轻松得很。
examples.pinyin: wǒ lǎopó de gōngzuò qīngsōng déhěn 。
examples.english: My wife's work is very easy.

examples.chinese: 我爸爸固执得不得了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ bàbà gùzhí dé bùdéle 。
examples.english: My dad is stubborn.

examples.chinese: 赢了比赛以后，他骄傲得不得了。
examples.pinyin: yíng le bǐsài yǐhòu ，tā jiāoào dé bùdéle 。
examples.english: After winning the game, he was extremely proud.

examples.chinese: 听说儿子又跟同学打架了，爸爸气得不得了。
examples.pinyin: tīngshuō érzǐ yòu gēn tóngxué dǎjià le ，bàbà qì dé bùdéle 。
examples.english: I heard that my son was fighting with his classmates again, and my father was very angry.

title: Advanced potential complements
structure: Verb + 得 / 不 + 了  /  Verb + 得 / 不 + 下  /  Verb + 得 / 不 + 起 + Obj.  /  Verb + 得 / 不 + 动  /  Verb + 得 / 不 + 着
explanation: Advanced potential complements. Used for describing actions, expressing possibility.

examples.chinese: 他那么老，走得了那么多路吗？
examples.pinyin: tā nàyāo lǎo ，zǒu dé le nàyāo duō lù ma ？
examples.english: He is so old, has he walked so many ways?

examples.chinese: 今晚我有事，去不了。
examples.pinyin: jīnwǎn wǒ yǒu shì ，qù bù le 。
examples.english: I have something tonight and I can't go.

examples.chinese: 这件衣服太小了，我穿不了。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiàn yīfú tài xiǎo le ，wǒ chuān bù le 。
examples.english: This dress is too small for me to wear.

examples.chinese: 这件事情只有你帮得了我。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiàn shìqíng zhǐ yǒu nǐ bāng dé le wǒ 。
examples.english: Only you can help me with this matter.

examples.chinese: 他没什么经验，处理不了这样的问题。
examples.pinyin: tā méi shíyāo jīngyàn ，chùlǐ bù le zhèyáng de wèntí 。
examples.english: He has no experience and can't handle such a problem.

title: Advanced result complements
explanation: Advanced result complements. Used for expressing result, expressing duration.

examples.chinese: 抓住那个小偷！
examples.pinyin: zhuāzhù nàgè xiǎotōu ！
examples.english: Grab the thief!

examples.chinese: 不好意思，你挡住了我的路。
examples.pinyin: bù hǎoyìsī ，nǐ dǎngzhù le wǒ de lù 。
examples.english: Sorry, you blocked my way.

examples.chinese: 一定要记住我的话。
examples.pinyin: yīdìng yào jìzhù wǒ de huà 。
examples.english: Be sure to remember my words.

examples.chinese: 你必须抓住机会。
examples.pinyin: nǐ bìxū zhuāzhù jīhùi 。
examples.english: You must seize the opportunity.

examples.chinese: 忍住！马上就好了。
examples.pinyin: rěnzhù ！mǎshàng jìu hǎole 。
examples.english: Hold back! Immediately.

title: Complement '-huai le'
explanation: Complement '-huai le'. Used for expressing result.

examples.chinese: 大家都累坏了。
examples.pinyin: dàjiā dū lèi huàile 。
examples.english: Everyone is exhausted.

examples.chinese: 我早饭和中饭都没吃，饿坏了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ zǎofàn hé zhōngfàn dū méi chī ，è huàile 。
examples.english: I didn't eat breakfast and lunch and was hungry.

examples.chinese: 发现爸爸又去赌钱了，妈妈气坏了。
examples.pinyin: fāxiàn bàbà yòu qù dǔqián le ，māmā qì huàile 。
examples.english: When my dad went to gamble again, my mother was furious.

examples.chinese: 孩子不见了，妈妈急坏了。
examples.pinyin: háizǐ bùjiàn le ，māmā jí huàile 。
examples.english: The child was gone and my mother was in a hurry.

examples.chinese: 一个男人突然拿出一把枪，乘客们都吓坏了。
examples.pinyin: yīgè nánrén tūrán náchū yībǎqiāng ，chéngkèmen dū xià huàile 。
examples.english: A man suddenly pulled out a gun, and the passengers were terrified.

title: Tricky uses of 'dao'
explanation: Tricky uses of 'dao'. Used for expressing result.

examples.chinese: 我还没有做。
examples.pinyin: wǒ huán méiyǒu zuò 。
examples.english: I haven't done it yet.

examples.chinese: 我下个星期可以做。
examples.pinyin: wǒ xià gè xīngqī kěyǐ zuò 。
examples.english: I can do it next week.

examples.chinese: 我相信你一定能做到。
examples.pinyin: wǒ xiāngxìn nǐ yīdìng néng zuòdào 。
examples.english: I believe you can do it.

examples.chinese: 我还没有买。
examples.pinyin: wǒ huán méiyǒu mǎi 。
examples.english: I haven't bought it yet.

examples.chinese: 我没买到。
examples.pinyin: wǒ méi mǎidào 。
examples.english: I didn't buy it.

title: Using 'lai' and 'qu' when 'verbing around'
explanation: Using 'lai' and 'qu' when 'verbing around'. Used for describing actions, expressing movement, expressing duration.

examples.chinese: 学生们都很紧张，在考场外面走来走去。
examples.pinyin: xuéshēngmen dū hěn jǐnzhāng，zài kǎocháng wàimiàn zǒu lái zǒu qù 。
examples.english: The students were very nervous and walked outside the examination room.

examples.chinese: 他说来说去还不承认自己错了。
examples.pinyin: tā shuō lái shuō qù huán bù chéngrèn zìjǐ cuò le 。
examples.english: He said that he didn't admit he was wrong.

examples.chinese: 我想来想去都想不明白，他怎么能那样对我？
examples.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng lái xiǎng qù dū xiǎng bù míngbái，tā zěnyāo néng nàyáng dùi wǒ ？
examples.english: I can't figure it out, how can he treat me like that?

examples.chinese: 他翻来翻去，终于找到了那双破袜子。
examples.pinyin: tā fān lái fān qù， zhōngyú zhǎodào le nà shuāng pò wàzǐ 。
examples.english: He rummaged around and finally found the pair of broken socks.

title: Using 'zhao' as complement
explanation: Using 'zhao' as complement. Used for expressing result, expressing duration.

examples.chinese: 宝宝刚睡着。
examples.pinyin: bǎobǎo gāng shùi zháo 。
examples.english: The baby just fell asleep.

examples.chinese: 你的手机找着了吗？
examples.pinyin: nǐ de shǒujī zhǎo zháo le ma ？
examples.english: Did you find your mobile phone?

examples.chinese: 超市关门了，你要的东西我没买着。
examples.pinyin: chāoshì guānmén le ，nǐ yào de dōngxī wǒ méi mǎi zháo 。
examples.english: The supermarket is closed. I didn't buy what you wanted.

examples.chinese: 晚上我睡不着的时候就看书。
examples.pinyin: wǎnshàng wǒ shùi bù zháo de shíhòu jìu kànshū 。
examples.english: I read when I can't sleep at night.

examples.chinese: 我的手机找不着了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ de shǒujī zhǎo bù zháo le 。
examples.english: My phone can't be found.

title: Expressing 'once...then...' with 'yidan...jiu...'
explanation: Expressing 'once...then...' with 'yidan...jiu...'. Used for indicating conditions, indicating cause and effect.

examples.chinese: 一旦我找好的工作，我就会安心。
examples.pinyin: yīdàn wǒ zhǎo hǎo de gōngzuò，wǒ jìu hùi ānxīn 。
examples.english: Once I find a good job, I will feel at ease.

examples.chinese: 这张桌子不稳定，一旦发生什么小小的振动，就会倒塌。
examples.pinyin: zhè zhāng zhuōzǐ bù wěndìng，yīdàn fāshēng shíyāo xiǎo xiǎo de zhèndòng，jìu hùi dǎotā 。
examples.english: This table is unstable and will collapse if there is any small vibration.

examples.chinese: 学习计算机科学的学生很自信，他们一旦毕业，就会找到很好的工作。
examples.pinyin: xuéxí jìsuànjī kēxué de xuéshēng hěn zìxìn，tāmen yīdàn bìyè，jìu hùi zhǎodào hěn hǎo de gōngzuò 。
examples.english: Students studying computer science are very confident that once they graduate, they will find a good job.

examples.chinese: 千万不要在经济泡沫中炒股，一旦市场崩溃，你会很后悔的！
examples.pinyin: qiānwàn bù yào zài jīngjì pàomò zhōng chǎogǔ，yīdàn shìcháng bēngkùi，nǐ hùi hěn hòuhǔi de！
examples.english: Don't speculate in the economic bubble, you will regret it once the market collapses!

title: Expressing 'even if…' with 'jiushi'
structure: 就是 + Hypothetical Statement + 也 + Action
explanation: Expressing 'even if…' with 'jiushi'. Used for indicating conditions, expressing determination.

examples.chinese: 就是这台电脑价格上万，我也会买。
examples.pinyin: jìushì zhè tái diànnǎo jiàgé shàngwàn，wǒ yě hùi mǎi 。
examples.english: Even if the price of this computer is tens of thousands, I will buy it.

examples.chinese: 就是降温了，我也要穿热裤，时尚嘛!
examples.pinyin: jìushì jiàngwēn le，wǒ yě yào chuān rèkù，shíshàng ma!
examples.english: Just to cool down, I also want to wear hot pants, fashion!

examples.chinese: 就是他变成一个穷光蛋，我也愿意跟他在一起。
examples.pinyin: jìushì tā biànchéng yīgè qióngguāngdàn，wǒ yě yuànyì gēn tā zài yīqǐ 。
examples.english: Even if he becomes a poor man, I am willing to be with him.

examples.chinese: 现在虽然是高峰期，但我也要出去。
examples.pinyin: xiànzài sūirán shì gāofēngqī，dàn wǒ yě yào chūqù 。
examples.english: Although it is the peak period now, I have to go out.

title: Expressing 'even if…' with 'jiusuan'
structure: 就算 ⋯⋯ ，也 ⋯⋯  /  就算 + 再 + Adj. ，也 ⋯⋯
explanation: Expressing 'even if…' with 'jiusuan'. Used for indicating conditions, expressing determination.

examples.chinese: 就算你不想听，我也要说。
examples.pinyin: jìusuàn nǐ bùxiǎng tīng ，wǒ yě yào shuō 。
examples.english: Even if you do n’t want to listen, I have to say.

examples.chinese: 就算你说的都是真的，我们也没办法证明。
examples.pinyin: jìusuàn nǐ shuō de dū shì zhēnde ，wǒmen yě méi bànfǎ zhèngmíng 。
examples.english: Even if what you said is true, we have no way to prove it.

examples.chinese: 就算会失败，我也不后悔。
examples.pinyin: jìusuàn hùi shībài ，wǒ yě bù hòuhǔi 。
examples.english: Even if it fails, I do not regret it.

examples.chinese: 就算他说他请客，我也要买单。
examples.pinyin: jìusuàn tā shuō tā qǐngkè ，wǒ yě yào mǎidān 。
examples.english: Even if he says he is going to treat guests, I will pay.

examples.chinese: 就算你通过了面试，也不一定能被录用。
examples.pinyin: jìusuàn nǐ tōngguò le miànshì ，yě bùyīdìng néng bèi lùyòng 。
examples.english: Even if you pass the interview, you may not be accepted.

title: Expressing 'even if…' with 'napa'
explanation: Expressing 'even if…' with 'napa'. Used for indicating conditions, expressing determination.

examples.chinese: 哪怕他不说，我也会知道。
examples.pinyin: nǎpà tā bù shuō ，wǒ yě hùi zhīdào 。
examples.english: Even if he does n’t say it, I will know.

examples.chinese: 哪怕你什么礼物都没买，她也会很开心的。
examples.pinyin: nǎpà nǐ shíyāo lǐwù dū méi mǎi ，tā yě hùi hěn kāixīn de 。
examples.english: Even if you didn't buy any gifts, she would be very happy.

examples.chinese: 哪怕他爸爸是总统，我也不要嫁给他！
examples.pinyin: nǎpà tā bàbà shì zǒngtǒng ，wǒ yě bù yào jià gěi tā ！
examples.english: Even if his father is the president, I don't want to marry him!

examples.chinese: 哪怕你们会不高兴，我也要把话说清楚。
examples.pinyin: nǎpà nǐmen hùi bù gāoxīng ，wǒ yě yào bǎ huà shuō qīngchǔ 。
examples.english: Even if you will be unhappy, I have to make it clear.

examples.chinese: 哪怕你打扮得像电影明星一样，他也不会看你一眼！
examples.pinyin: nǎpà nǐ dǎbàn dé xiàng diànyǐng míngxīng yīyáng ，tā yě bù hùi kàn nǐ yī yǎn ！
examples.english: Even if you dress like a movie star, he will not look at you!

title: Expressing 'if… then…' with 'jiaru'
explanation: Expressing 'if… then…' with 'jiaru'. Used for indicating conditions, indicating cause and effect, expressing possibility.

examples.chinese: 假如你的成绩再好一点儿，你就能申请北大了。
examples.pinyin: jiǎrú nǐ de chéngjī zài hǎo yīdiǎnér，nǐ jìu néng shēnqǐng běidà le 。
examples.english: If your grades are better, you can apply for Peking University.

examples.chinese: 假如我是你，我就戒烟。
examples.pinyin: jiǎrú wǒ shì nǐ，wǒ jìu jièyān 。
examples.english: If I were you, I would quit smoking.

examples.chinese: 假如你的女朋友不爱你，你们就分手吧。
examples.pinyin: jiǎrú nǐ de nv̌péngyǒu bù ài nǐ，nǐmen jìu fēnshǒu ba 。
examples.english: If your girlfriend doesn't love you, you can break up.

title: Expressing 'if… then…' with 'jiashi'
explanation: Expressing 'if… then…' with 'jiashi'. Used for indicating conditions, indicating cause and effect, expressing possibility.

examples.chinese: 假使明天下雨，我就不去上班了。
examples.pinyin: jiǎshǐ míngtiān xiàyǔ，wǒ jìu bù qù shàngbān le 。
examples.english: If it rains tomorrow, I won't go to work.

examples.chinese: 假使你同意，我们立马签合同。
examples.pinyin: jiǎshǐ nǐ tóngyì，wǒmen lìmǎ qiān hétóng 。
examples.english: If you agree, we will immediately sign the contract.

examples.chinese: 假使我们能找到更多的赞助，我们就可以帮助更多的孩子。
examples.pinyin: jiǎshǐ wǒmen néng zhǎodào gèng duō de zànzhù，wǒmen jìu kěyǐ bāngzhù gèngduō de háizǐ 。
examples.english: If we can find more sponsorship, we can help more children.

title: Expressing 'what if' with 'wanyi'
explanation: Expressing 'what if' with 'wanyi'. Used for expressing possibility.

examples.chinese: 万一我父母不同意呢？
examples.pinyin: wànyī wǒ fùmǔ bù tóngyì ní ？
examples.english: What if my parents disagree?

examples.chinese: 万一被发现了怎么办？
examples.pinyin: wànyī bèi fāxiàn le zěnyāobàn ？
examples.english: What if I was found?

examples.chinese: 带着伞吧，万一下雨呢？
examples.pinyin: dài zháo sǎn ba ，wànyī xiàyǔ ní ？
examples.english: Bring an umbrella, what if it rains?

examples.chinese: 你先打电话问问。
examples.pinyin: nǐ xiān dǎ diànhuà wènwèn 。
examples.english: You call and ask first.

examples.chinese: 开慢点！万一撞到人怎么办？
examples.pinyin: kāi màndiǎn ！wànyī zhuàngdào rén zěnyāobàn ？
examples.english: Drive slowly! What if you hit someone?

title: Marking a topic with 'de hua'
explanation: Marking a topic with 'de hua'. Used for marking a topic.

examples.chinese: 北京的话，秋天去最好。
examples.pinyin: běijīng dehuà，qīutiān qù zùihǎo 。
examples.english: In Beijing, it is best to go in autumn.

examples.chinese: 晚上的话，当然方便啦。
examples.pinyin: wǎnshàng dehuà，dāngrán fāngbiàn la 。
examples.english: At night, of course it is convenient.

examples.chinese: 这个问题的话，我不太方便说。
examples.pinyin: zhègè wèntí dehuà，wǒ bù tài fāngbiàn shuō 。
examples.english: For this question, I am not very convenient to say.

examples.chinese: 我肯定能去。
examples.pinyin: wǒ kěndìng néng qù 。
examples.english: I can definitely go.

examples.chinese: 我们的要求比较高。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen de yàoqíu bǐjiào gāo 。
examples.english: Our requirements are relatively high.

title: Advanced uses of 'ba'
structure: Subj. + 把 + Obj. + 给 + Verb Phrase
explanation: Advanced uses of 'ba'. Used for sentence patterns, expressing passive voice.

examples.chinese: 我把这事儿给忘了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ bǎ zhè shìér gěi wàng le 。
examples.english: I forgot about it.

examples.chinese: 周末我把脏衣服给洗了。
examples.pinyin: zhōumò wǒ bǎ zāng yīfú gěi xǐ le 。
examples.english: I washed the dirty clothes on the weekend.

examples.chinese: 你能把这些都给记住吗？
examples.pinyin: nǐ néng bǎ zhèxiē dū gěi jìzhù ma ？
examples.english: Can you remember all this?

examples.chinese: 他把我的手机给摔坏了。
examples.pinyin: tā bǎ wǒde shǒujī gěi shuāihuài le 。
examples.english: He broke my mobile phone.

examples.chinese: 妈妈把没用的东西都给扔了。
examples.pinyin: māmā bǎ méi yòngde dōngxī dū gěi rēngle 。
examples.english: Mother threw away all the useless things.

title: Basic comparisons with 'bu bi'
explanation: Basic comparisons with 'bu bi'. Used for denying and refusing, comparing.

examples.chinese: 你不比别人笨。
examples.pinyin: nǐ bù bǐ biérén bèn 。
examples.english: You are not dumb than others.

examples.chinese: 他太太的工资不比他低。
examples.pinyin: tā tàitài de gōngzī bù bǐ tā dī 。
examples.english: His wife's salary is not lower than him.

examples.chinese: 上海不比纽约便宜。
examples.pinyin: shànghǎibù bǐ nǐuyuē biànyí 。
examples.english: Shanghai is not cheaper than New York.

examples.chinese: 有人觉得养宠物不比养小孩容易。
examples.pinyin: yǒurén juédé yǎngchǒngwù bù bǐ yǎng xiǎohái róngyì 。
examples.english: Some people think that keeping pets is not easier than raising children.

examples.chinese: 你不比歌手唱得差。
examples.pinyin: nǐ bù bǐ gēshǒu chàng dé chà 。
examples.english: You are no worse than a singer.

title: Conditions with 'yao' and 'jiu'
explanation: Conditions with 'yao' and 'jiu'. Used for giving commands, indicating conditions, expressing attitude.

examples.chinese: 要走就走，我们不需要你。
examples.pinyin: yào zǒu jìu zǒu ，wǒmen bù xūyào nǐ 。
examples.english: To leave, we don't need you.

examples.chinese: 要买就买，我们快关门了。
examples.pinyin: yào mǎi jìu mǎi ，wǒmen kuài guānmén le 。
examples.english: Buy if you want, we are closing.

examples.chinese: 要说就说，别吞吞吐吐。
examples.pinyin: yào shuō jìu shuō ，bié tūntūntǔtǔ 。
examples.english: Talk about it, don't talk about it.

examples.chinese: 要去就去，不用等我们。
examples.pinyin: yào qù jìu qù ，bùyòng děng wǒmen 。
examples.english: If you want to go, go without waiting for us.

examples.chinese: 要吃就吃，不要客气。
examples.pinyin: yào chī jìu chī ，bùyào kèqì 。
examples.english: Eat if you want, don't be polite.

title: Expressing 'in the name of' with 'yi... de mingyi'
explanation: Expressing 'in the name of' with 'yi... de mingyi'

examples.chinese: 不要以我的名义给公司写信,公司会找我麻烦的.
examples.pinyin: bùyàoyǐwǒdemíngyìgěigōngsīxiěxìn, gōngsīhùizhǎowǒmáfánde.
examples.english: Don't write to the company in my name, the company will trouble me.

examples.chinese: 这个人是个诈骗犯,所以以政府的名义起诉了他.
examples.pinyin: zhègèrénshìgèzhàpiànfàn, suǒyǐyǐzhèngfǔdemíngyìqǐsùletā.
examples.english: This man is a fraudster, so he was prosecuted in the name of the government.

examples.chinese: 以保护生命的名义去屠杀其他种族的人,并不是道德的.
